===== lines 21601-23150 =====
21601:         const countStatus = key => scoped.filter(entry => criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry) === key).length;
21602:         const counts = {
21603:         all: scoped.length,
21604:         attention: scoped.filter(entry => ['no-scene', 'assistance'].includes(criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry))).length,
21605:         responding: scoped.filter(entry => Math.max(0, Number(entry?.units?.onWay ?? entry?.units?.travelling) || 0) > 0).length,
21606:         clearing: countStatus('clearing'),
21607:         stable: countStatus('on-scene'),
21608:         'my-units': scoped.filter(criticalEntryHasMyUnits).length
21609:         };
21610:         const selected = selectedCriticalQuickView();
21611:         const definitions = [
21612:         ['all', 'All', 'Show every mission matching the ownership, category and age filters'],
21613:         ['attention', 'Attention', 'Show missions with no units on scene or detected assistance requirements'],
21614:         ['responding', 'Responding', 'Show missions with at least one vehicle on the way'],
21615:         ['clearing', 'Clearing', 'Show missions currently completing'],
21616:         ['stable', 'Stable', 'Show missions with units on scene and no detected issue'],
21617:         ['my-units', 'My Units', 'Show missions with one of your units committed']
21618:         ];
21619:         return definitions.map(([key, label, title]) => {
21620:         const active = selected === key;
21621:         const count = Number(counts[key]) || 0;
21622:         return `<button type="button" class="mcms-critical-quick-view mcms-quick-${escapeHtml(key)}${active ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}${count === 0 ? ' mcms-zero' : ''}" data-critical-quick-view="${escapeHtml(key)}" aria-pressed="${active ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="${escapeHtml(title)}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${count.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><i aria-hidden="true">${active ? '✓' : ''}</i></button>`;
21623:         }).join('');
21624:     }
21625: 
21626:     function criticalOperationalFilterLabel() {
21627:         const quick = selectedCriticalQuickView();
21628:         const labels = {
21629:         all: 'All missions',
21630:         attention: 'Needs attention',
21631:         responding: 'Responding',
21632:         clearing: 'Clearing',
21633:         stable: 'Stable',
21634:         'my-units': 'Only my units'
21635:         };
21636:         return labels[quick] || `Custom: ${criticalAdvancedFilterSummaryText()}`;
21637:     }
21638: 
21639:     function criticalFilterOverviewHtml(allEntries, visibleEntries) {
21640:         const ownership = { all: 'All ownership', personal: 'Personal', alliance: 'Alliance' }[selectedCriticalOwnershipFilter()] || 'Personal';
21641:         const category = { all: 'All categories', standard: 'Standard', event: 'Timed event', special: 'Special event' }[selectedCriticalCategoryFilter()] || 'All categories';
21642:         const filterText = `${ownership} · ${category} · ${criticalOperationalFilterLabel()}`;
21643:         const showing = `Showing ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} of ${allEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')}`;
21644:         return `<span class="mcms-critical-filter-overview-copy"><small>ACTIVE FILTER</small><strong title="${escapeHtml(filterText)}">${escapeHtml(filterText)}</strong></span><span class="mcms-critical-filter-overview-count">${escapeHtml(showing)}</span>${missionAgeWatchHasNonDefaultState() ? '<button type="button" data-critical-clear-filters title="Reset all Mission Age Watch filters and sorting">Clear</button>' : ''}`;
21645:     }
21646: 
21647:     function criticalOwnershipFiltersHtml(allEntries) {
21648:         const selected = selectedCriticalOwnershipFilter();
21649:         const scoped = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['ownership']);
21650:         const counts = { all: scoped.length, personal: 0, alliance: 0 };
21651:         scoped.forEach(entry => { if (CRITICAL_OWNERSHIP_KEYS.includes(entry.ownership)) counts[entry.ownership] += 1; });
21652:         const button = (key, label, title) => {
21653:         const active = selected === key;
21654:         const allianceClass = key === 'alliance' ? ' mcms-alliance-text' : '';
21655:         return `<button type="button" class="mcms-critical-type-filter mcms-ownership-${escapeHtml(key)}${active ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}" data-critical-ownership-filter="${escapeHtml(key)}" aria-pressed="${active ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="${escapeHtml(title)}"><span class="${allianceClass.trim()}">${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${counts[key].toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><i aria-hidden="true">${active ? '✓ SELECTED' : 'SELECT'}</i></button>`;
21656:         };
21657:         return `<span class="mcms-critical-type-label">OWNERSHIP</span>${button('all', 'All', 'Show Personal and Alliance missions')}${button('personal', 'Personal', 'Show missions owned by you')}${button('alliance', 'Alliance', 'Show Alliance-owned or Alliance-shared missions')}`;
21658:     }
21659: 
21660:     function criticalCategoryFiltersHtml(allEntries) {
21661:         const selected = selectedCriticalCategoryFilter();
21662:         const scoped = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['category']);
21663:         const counts = { all: scoped.length, standard: 0, event: 0, special: 0 };
21664:         scoped.forEach(entry => { if (CRITICAL_CATEGORY_KEYS.includes(entry.category)) counts[entry.category] += 1; });
21665:         const button = (key, label, title) => {
21666:         const active = selected === key;
21667:         return `<button type="button" class="mcms-critical-category-filter mcms-category-${escapeHtml(key)}${active ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}${counts[key] === 0 ? ' mcms-zero' : ''}" data-critical-category-filter="${escapeHtml(key)}" aria-pressed="${active ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="${escapeHtml(title)}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${counts[key].toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><i aria-hidden="true">${active ? '✓' : ''}</i></button>`;
21668:         };
21669:         return `<span class="mcms-critical-category-label">CATEGORY</span>${button('all', 'All', 'Show Standard, Timed Event and Special Event missions')}${button('standard', 'Standard', 'Show normal missions')}${button('event', 'Timed Event', 'Show ordinary timed or community Event missions')}${button('special', 'Special Event', 'Show official developer-launched Special Event missions')}`;
21670:     }
21671: 
21672:     function criticalMissionValueDetails(entry) {
21673:         if (entry?.valueDetails && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(entry.valueDetails, 'value')) return entry.valueDetails;
21674:         const missionId = normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId);
21675:         const marker = entry?.marker || entry?.snapshot?.marker || null;
21676:         const liveMarkerValue = exactCreditFromObject(marker);
21677:         if (liveMarkerValue !== null) return { value: liveMarkerValue, source: 'live marker' };
21678:         const snapshotValue = parseCreditValue(entry?.snapshot?.averageCredits);
21679:         if (snapshotValue !== null) return { value: snapshotValue, source: 'mission snapshot' };
21680:         const overlayValue = missionId === null ? null : parseCreditValue(missionOverlayData.get(missionId)?.averageCredits);
21681:         if (overlayValue !== null) return { value: overlayValue, source: 'captured mission data' };
21682:         const entryValue = parseCreditValue(entry?.averageCredits);
21683:         if (entryValue !== null) return { value: entryValue, source: 'watcher record' };
21684:         const panelValue = missionId === null ? null : creditsFromMissionPanel(missionId);
21685:         if (panelValue !== null) return { value: panelValue, source: 'mission list' };
21686:         return { value: null, source: 'unavailable' };
21687:     }
21688: 
21689: 
21690:     function missionValueCurrencyMeta(hostname = location.hostname) {
21691:         const host = String(hostname || '').trim().toLowerCase();
21692:         if (/(?:^|\.)missionchief\.com$/u.test(host)) return { locale: 'en-US', symbol: '$' };
21693:         if (/(?:^|\.)leitstellenspiel\.de$/u.test(host)) return { locale: 'de-DE', symbol: '€' };
21694:         if (/(?:^|\.)meldkamerspel\.com$/u.test(host)) return { locale: 'nl-NL', symbol: '€' };
21695:         return { locale: 'en-GB', symbol: '£' };
21696:     }
21697: 
21698:     function formatMissionWindowValue(value, hostname = location.hostname) {
21699:         const amount = Number(value);
21700:         if (!Number.isFinite(amount) || amount < 0) return '';
21701:         const { locale, symbol } = missionValueCurrencyMeta(hostname);
21702:         return `${symbol}${Math.round(amount).toLocaleString(locale)}`;
21703:     }
21704: 
21705:     function missionValueIdFromUrl(value, baseUrl = location.href) {
21706:         let pathname = String(value || '').trim();
21707:         if (!pathname) return null;
21708:         try { pathname = new URL(pathname, baseUrl).pathname; } catch (err) {}
21709:         const match = pathname.match(/\/missions\/(\d+)(?:\/|$)/u);
21710:         return match ? normaliseMissionId(match[1]) : null;
21711:     }
21712: 
21713:     function missionValueIdFromElement(root) {
21714:         if (!root) return null;
21715:         const doc = root.ownerDocument || document;
21716:         const directNodes = [root];
21717:         try {
21718:         directNodes.push(...root.querySelectorAll('[data-mission-id], [data-mission_id], input[name="mission_id"], input[name="mission[id]"]'));
21719:         } catch (err) {}
21720:         for (const node of directNodes) {
21721:         const candidates = [
21722:             node?.dataset?.missionId,
21723:             node?.dataset?.mission_id,
21724:             node?.getAttribute?.('data-mission-id'),
21725:             node?.getAttribute?.('data-mission_id'),
21726:             node?.value
21727:         ];
21728:         for (const candidate of candidates) {
21729:             const id = normaliseMissionId(candidate);
21730:             if (id !== null) return id;
21731:         }
21732:         const idMatch = String(node?.id || '').match(/(?:^|_)(?:mission|mission_content|mission_panel)_(\d+)(?:$|_)/u);
21733:         if (idMatch) return normaliseMissionId(idMatch[1]);
21734:         }
21735: 
21736:         let routeNodes = [];
21737:         try {
21738:         routeNodes = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/missions/"], form[action*="/missions/"], [data-url*="/missions/"], [data-href*="/missions/"]'));
21739:         } catch (err) {}
21740:         for (const node of routeNodes) {
21741:         for (const attribute of ['href', 'action', 'data-url', 'data-href']) {
21742:             const id = missionValueIdFromUrl(node.getAttribute?.(attribute), doc.location?.href || location.href);
21743:             if (id !== null) return id;
21744:         }
21745:         }
21746: 
21747:         if (doc !== document) {
21748:         try {
21749:             const id = missionValueIdFromUrl(doc.location?.href, location.href);
21750:             if (id !== null) return id;
21751:         } catch (err) {}
21752:         }
21753:         return null;
21754:     }
21755: 
21756:     function missionValueMountForRoot(root) {
21757:         if (!root) return null;
21758:         const selector = '.lightbox_content, .modal-body, #mission_content, .mission_content, [data-mission-content]';
21759:         try {
21760:         if (root.matches?.(selector)) return root;
21761:         return root.querySelector?.(selector) || root;
21762:         } catch (err) {
21763:         return root;
21764:         }
21765:     }
21766: 
21767:         function missionValueWindowCandidates() {
21768:         const discovered = [];
21769:         const add = root => {
21770:         if (!root?.isConnected) return;
21771:         const missionId = missionValueIdFromElement(root);
21772:         if (missionId === null) return;
21773:         const mount = missionValueMountForRoot(root);
21774:         if (!mount?.isConnected || mount.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.panelId}, #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId}`)) return;
21775:         const toolbarSpacer = missionValueToolbarSpacer(root, mount);
21776:         const toolbar = missionValueToolbarBar(toolbarSpacer, root, mount);
21777:         discovered.push({ root, mount, missionId, toolbarSpacer, toolbar });
21778:         };
21779: 
21780:         transportSweepVisibleWindowRoots().forEach(add);
21781:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
21782:         observeMissionValueDocument(context.doc);
21783:         if (context.doc !== document) {
21784:             try {
21785:                 if (missionValueIdFromUrl(context.doc.location?.href, location.href) !== null) add(context.doc.body);
21786:             } catch (err) {}
21787:         }
21788:         }
21789:         return missionValuePreferredCandidates(discovered);
21790:     }
21791: 
21792:     function removeMissionValueRows(scope = document) {
21793:         try { scope.querySelectorAll?.('.mcms-mission-value-row').forEach(row => row.remove()); } catch (err) {}
21794:     }
21795: 
21796:     function clearMissionValueIndicators() {
21797:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) removeMissionValueRows(context.doc);
21798:     }
21799: 
21800: 
21801:         function missionValueToolbarSpacer(root, mount) {
21802:         const scopes = [root, mount].filter(Boolean);
21803:         for (const scope of scopes) {
21804:         try {
21805:             if (scope.matches?.('#navbar-alarm-spacer')) return scope;
21806:             const spacer = scope.querySelector?.('#navbar-alarm-spacer');
21807:             if (spacer) return spacer;
21808:         } catch (err) {}
21809:         }
21810:         const doc = root?.ownerDocument || mount?.ownerDocument || null;
21811:         if (!doc || (root !== doc.body && mount !== doc.body)) return null;
21812:         try {
21813:         return missionValueIdFromUrl(doc.location?.href, location.href) !== null
21814:             ? doc.getElementById?.('navbar-alarm-spacer') || null
21815:             : null;
21816:         } catch (err) {
21817:         return null;
21818:         }
21819:     }
21820: 
21821:     function missionValueToolbarBar(spacer, root, mount) {
21822:         if (spacer?.isConnected) {
21823:         try {
21824:             return spacer.closest?.('.navbar-header.flex-row.flex-nowrap.align-items-center, .navbar-header') || spacer.parentElement || null;
21825:         } catch (err) {}
21826:         }
21827:         for (const scope of [root, mount]) {
21828:         try {
21829:             const bars = Array.from(scope?.querySelectorAll?.('.navbar-header.flex-row.flex-nowrap.align-items-center, .navbar-header') || []);
21830:             const bar = bars.find(candidate => candidate.querySelector?.('#navbar-alarm-spacer'));
21831:             if (bar) return bar;
21832:         } catch (err) {}
21833:         }
21834:         return null;
21835:     }
21836: 
21837:     function missionValueSpacerVisibleWidth(spacer) {
21838:         if (!spacer?.isConnected) return 0;
21839:         try {
21840:         const view = spacer.ownerDocument?.defaultView || pageWindow;
21841:         const style = view?.getComputedStyle?.(spacer);
21842:         if (style?.display === 'none' || style?.visibility === 'hidden' || style?.visibility === 'collapse' || Number(style?.opacity) === 0) return 0;
21843:         } catch (err) {}
21844:         try {
21845:         const rect = spacer.getBoundingClientRect?.();
21846:         return rect && rect.width > 0 ? Math.max(0, Math.floor(rect.width)) : 0;
21847:         } catch (err) {
21848:         return 0;
21849:         }
21850:     }
21851: 
21852:     function missionValuePresentation(availableWidth, formatted) {
21853:         const width = Math.max(0, Number(availableWidth) || 0);
21854:         const value = String(formatted || '');
21855:         if (width >= 176) return { mode: 'full', text: `Mission Value · ${value}` };
21856:         if (width >= 110) return { mode: 'short', text: `Value · ${value}` };
21857:         if (width >= 58) return { mode: 'value', text: value };
21858:         return { mode: 'fallback', text: `Mission Value · ${value}` };
21859:     }
21860: 
21861:     function missionValuePreferredCandidates(candidateList) {
21862:         const groups = new Map();
21863:         for (const candidate of Array.from(candidateList || [])) {
21864:         const missionId = normaliseMissionId(candidate?.missionId);
21865:         if (missionId === null || !candidate?.mount?.isConnected) continue;
21866:         if (!groups.has(missionId)) groups.set(missionId, []);
21867:         groups.get(missionId).push(candidate);
21868:         }
21869:         const selected = [];
21870:         for (const group of groups.values()) {
21871:         const toolbarCandidates = group.filter(candidate => candidate.toolbarSpacer?.isConnected && candidate.toolbar?.isConnected);
21872:         const pool = toolbarCandidates.length ? toolbarCandidates : group;
21873:         const seenHosts = new Set();
21874:         for (const candidate of pool) {
21875:             const host = candidate.toolbarSpacer?.isConnected ? candidate.toolbarSpacer : candidate.mount;
21876:             if (!host || seenHosts.has(host)) continue;
21877:             seenHosts.add(host);
21878:             selected.push(candidate);
21879:         }
21880:         }
21881:         return selected;
21882:     }
21883: 
21884:     function missionValueCandidateScopes(candidate) {
21885:         const scopes = new Set([candidate?.root, candidate?.mount, candidate?.toolbarSpacer, candidate?.toolbar].filter(Boolean));
21886:         const doc = candidate?.root?.ownerDocument || candidate?.mount?.ownerDocument || null;
21887:         try {
21888:         const frame = doc?.defaultView?.frameElement || null;
21889:         if (frame) {
21890:             scopes.add(frame);
21891:             const frameWindow = frame.closest?.('#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .modal, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog, .lightbox_content');
21892:             if (frameWindow) scopes.add(frameWindow);
21893:         }
21894:         } catch (err) {}
21895:         return Array.from(scopes);
21896:     }
21897: 
21898:     function missionValueRowsForCandidate(candidate) {
21899:         const rows = new Set();
21900:         for (const scope of missionValueCandidateScopes(candidate)) {
21901:         try {
21902:             if (scope.matches?.('.mcms-mission-value-row')) rows.add(scope);
21903:             scope.querySelectorAll?.('.mcms-mission-value-row').forEach(row => rows.add(row));
21904:         } catch (err) {}
21905:         }
21906:         return Array.from(rows);
21907:     }
21908: 
21909:     function pruneMissionValueHostObservers(activeSpacers = null) {
21910:         for (const [spacer, record] of missionValueHostObservers) {
21911:         const keep = Boolean(spacer?.isConnected && record?.toolbar?.isConnected && (!activeSpacers || activeSpacers.has(spacer)));
21912:         if (keep) continue;
21913:         try { record?.resizeObserver?.disconnect?.(); } catch (err) {}
21914:         try { record?.mutationObserver?.disconnect?.(); } catch (err) {}
21915:         missionValueHostObservers.delete(spacer);
21916:         }
21917:     }
21918: 
21919:     function observeMissionValueHost(candidate) {
21920:         const spacer = candidate?.toolbarSpacer;
21921:         const toolbar = candidate?.toolbar;
21922:         if (!spacer?.isConnected || !toolbar?.isConnected) return;
21923:         const existing = missionValueHostObservers.get(spacer);
21924:         if (existing?.toolbar === toolbar) return;
21925:         if (existing) {
21926:         try { existing.resizeObserver?.disconnect?.(); } catch (err) {}
21927:         try { existing.mutationObserver?.disconnect?.(); } catch (err) {}
21928:         }
21929:         const view = spacer.ownerDocument?.defaultView || pageWindow;
21930:         const ResizeObserverCtor = view?.ResizeObserver || pageWindow.ResizeObserver;
21931:         const MutationObserverCtor = view?.MutationObserver || pageWindow.MutationObserver || MutationObserver;
21932:         const record = { toolbar, resizeObserver: null, mutationObserver: null };
21933:         if (typeof ResizeObserverCtor === 'function') {
21934:         record.resizeObserver = runtimeTrackObserver(new ResizeObserverCtor(() => scheduleMissionValueScan(24)));
21935:         record.resizeObserver.observe(spacer);
21936:         }
21937:         if (typeof MutationObserverCtor === 'function') {
21938:         record.mutationObserver = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserverCtor(() => scheduleMissionValueScan(24)));
21939:         record.mutationObserver.observe(toolbar, { childList: true, subtree: false });
21940:         }
21941:         missionValueHostObservers.set(spacer, record);
21942:     }
21943: 
21944:     
21945: 
21946:     
21947: 
21948:         function syncMissionValueCandidate(candidate) {
21949:         const { mount, missionId, toolbarSpacer, toolbar } = candidate || {};
21950:         if (!mount?.isConnected || missionId === null) return null;
21951:         const marker = getMissionMarkerIndex().byId.get(missionId) || getMissionMarkerIndex().byId.get(String(missionId)) || null;
21952:         const snapshot = liveMissionSnapshots.get(missionId) || liveMissionSnapshots.get(String(missionId)) || missionSnapshotCache.get(missionId) || missionSnapshotCache.get(String(missionId)) || null;
21953:         const details = criticalMissionValueDetails({ missionId, marker, snapshot });
21954:         const formatted = formatMissionWindowValue(details.value);
21955:         const existingRows = missionValueRowsForCandidate(candidate);
21956:         if (!formatted) {
21957:         existingRows.forEach(row => row.remove());
21958:         return null;
21959:         }
21960: 
21961:         observeMissionValueHost(candidate);
21962:         const availableWidth = missionValueSpacerVisibleWidth(toolbarSpacer);
21963:         const presentation = missionValuePresentation(availableWidth, formatted);
21964:         const useToolbar = Boolean(toolbarSpacer?.isConnected && toolbar?.isConnected && presentation.mode !== 'fallback');
21965:         const targetDocument = (useToolbar ? toolbarSpacer.ownerDocument : mount.ownerDocument) || document;
21966:         let row = null;
21967:         if (useToolbar) {
21968:         row = existingRows.find(candidateRow => candidateRow.parentNode === toolbarSpacer) || null;
21969:         } else if (toolbar?.parentNode) {
21970:         row = existingRows.find(candidateRow => candidateRow.parentNode === toolbar.parentNode && candidateRow.previousElementSibling === toolbar) || null;
21971:         }
21972:         row ||= existingRows.find(candidateRow => candidateRow.ownerDocument === targetDocument) || null;
21973:         existingRows.forEach(candidateRow => {
21974:         if (candidateRow !== row) candidateRow.remove();
21975:         });
21976:         if (!row) row = targetDocument.createElement('div');
21977:         row.className = 'mcms-mission-value-row';
21978:         row.setAttribute('data-mcms-mission-value', 'true');
21979:         row.dataset.mcmsMissionId = String(missionId);
21980:         row.dataset.mcmsHost = useToolbar ? 'toolbar' : 'fallback';
21981:         row.dataset.mcmsMode = useToolbar ? presentation.mode : 'fallback';
21982: 
21983:         let badges = [];
21984:         try { badges = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('.mcms-mission-value-badge')); } catch (err) {}
21985:         const badge = badges.shift() || targetDocument.createElement('span');
21986:         badges.forEach(extra => extra.remove());
21987:         badge.className = 'mcms-mission-value-badge';
21988:         if (badge.parentNode !== row) row.appendChild(badge);
21989: 
21990:         if (useToolbar) {
21991:         if (row.parentNode !== toolbarSpacer) toolbarSpacer.appendChild(row);
21992:         } else if (toolbar?.parentNode) {
21993:         if (row.parentNode !== toolbar.parentNode || row.previousElementSibling !== toolbar) {
21994:             toolbar.parentNode.insertBefore(row, toolbar.nextSibling);
21995:         }
21996:         } else if (row.parentNode !== mount || row !== mount.firstElementChild) {
21997:         mount.insertBefore(row, mount.firstChild || null);
21998:         }
21999: 
22000:         const fullLabel = `Mission Value · ${formatted}`;
22001:         const text = useToolbar ? presentation.text : fullLabel;
22002:         if (badge.textContent !== text) badge.textContent = text;
22003:         badge.title = `${fullLabel} · ${details.source}`;
22004:         badge.setAttribute('aria-label', fullLabel);
22005:         row.setAttribute('aria-label', fullLabel);
22006:         return row;
22007:     }
22008: 
22009:     function scheduleMissionValueScan(delay = 80) {
22010:         runtimeClearTimeout(missionValueScanTimer);
22011:         missionValueScanTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
22012:         missionValueScanTimer = null;
22013:         scanMissionValueWindows();
22014:         }, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
22015:     }
22016: 
22017:         function scanMissionValueWindows() {
22018:         if (!state.missionValue) {
22019:         clearMissionValueIndicators();
22020:         pruneMissionValueHostObservers(new Set());
22021:         return;
22022:         }
22023:         let needsRetry = false;
22024:         const activeRows = new Set();
22025:         const activeSpacers = new Set();
22026:         for (const candidate of missionValueWindowCandidates()) {
22027:         if (candidate.toolbarSpacer?.isConnected) activeSpacers.add(candidate.toolbarSpacer);
22028:         const renderedRow = syncMissionValueCandidate(candidate);
22029:         if (renderedRow) {
22030:             activeRows.add(renderedRow);
22031:             missionValueRetryState.delete(candidate.mount);
22032:             continue;
22033:         }
22034:         const previous = missionValueRetryState.get(candidate.mount);
22035:         const attempts = previous?.missionId === candidate.missionId ? previous.attempts : 0;
22036:         if (attempts < 3) {
22037:             missionValueRetryState.set(candidate.mount, { missionId: candidate.missionId, attempts: attempts + 1 });
22038:             needsRetry = true;
22039:         }
22040:         }
22041:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
22042:         try {
22043:             context.doc.querySelectorAll?.('.mcms-mission-value-row').forEach(row => {
22044:                 if (!activeRows.has(row)) row.remove();
22045:             });
22046:         } catch (err) {}
22047:         }
22048:         pruneMissionValueHostObservers(activeSpacers);
22049:         if (needsRetry) runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionValueScan(0), 650);
22050:     }
22051: 
22052:         function ensureMissionValueDocumentStyle(doc) {
22053:         if (!doc || doc === document) return;
22054:         const styleId = 'mcms-mission-value-document-style';
22055:         if (doc.getElementById?.(styleId)) return;
22056:         const style = doc.createElement?.('style');
22057:         if (!style) return;
22058:         style.id = styleId;
22059:         style.textContent = `
22060:             .mcms-mission-value-row{display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:flex-end!important;min-width:0!important;box-sizing:border-box!important;position:relative!important;z-index:2!important;pointer-events:none!important}
22061:             #navbar-alarm-spacer>.mcms-mission-value-row,.mcms-mission-value-row[data-mcms-host="toolbar"]{flex:1 1 auto!important;width:100%!important;min-height:32px!important;margin:0!important;padding:0 3px 0 6px!important;clear:none!important;overflow:hidden!important}
22062:             .mcms-mission-value-row[data-mcms-host="fallback"]{width:100%!important;min-height:30px!important;margin:0 0 6px 0!important;padding:4px 8px!important;clear:both!important;overflow:hidden!important}
22063:             .mcms-mission-value-badge{display:inline-flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;max-width:100%!important;min-width:0!important;min-height:24px!important;box-sizing:border-box!important;padding:4px 9px!important;border:1px solid rgba(235,190,64,.72)!important;border-radius:8px!important;background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(48,39,13,.96),rgba(19,21,24,.96))!important;color:#ffe59a!important;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.34)!important;font:900 11px/1.2 Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif!important;letter-spacing:.15px!important;text-align:right!important;white-space:nowrap!important;overflow:hidden!important;text-overflow:ellipsis!important;pointer-events:none!important}
22064:             .mcms-mission-value-row[data-mcms-mode="value"] .mcms-mission-value-badge{padding-left:7px!important;padding-right:7px!important}
22065:             @media(max-width:767px){.mcms-mission-value-row[data-mcms-host="fallback"]{padding:4px 6px!important}.mcms-mission-value-badge{font-size:10px!important}}
22066:         `;
22067:         (doc.head || doc.documentElement)?.appendChild(style);
22068:     }
22069: 
22070:     function clearMissionValueDocumentStyles() {
22071:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
22072:         if (context.doc === document) continue;
22073:         try { context.doc.getElementById?.('mcms-mission-value-document-style')?.remove(); } catch (err) {}
22074:         }
22075:     }
22076: 
22077:     function observeMissionValueFrame(frame) {
22078:         if (!frame || missionValueObservedFrames.has(frame)) return;
22079:         missionValueObservedFrames.add(frame);
22080:         const onLoad = () => scheduleMissionValueScan(40);
22081:         frame.addEventListener('load', onLoad);
22082:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => frame.removeEventListener('load', onLoad));
22083:     }
22084: 
22085:         function observeMissionValueDocument(doc) {
22086:         if (!doc) return;
22087:         ensureMissionValueDocumentStyle(doc);
22088:         if (missionValueObservedDocuments.has(doc)) return;
22089:         missionValueObservedDocuments.add(doc);
22090:         let frames = [];
22091:         try { frames = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('iframe, frame')); } catch (err) {}
22092:         frames.forEach(observeMissionValueFrame);
22093:         const root = doc.documentElement || doc.body;
22094:         if (!root) return;
22095:         const activitySelector = '#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog, iframe, frame, a[href*="/missions/"], form[action*="/missions/"], #navbar-alarm-spacer, #navbar-right-help-button, [id^="lssmv4-shareAlliancePost_alarm"], .navbar-header';
22096:         const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(mutations => {
22097:         const relevant = mutations.some(mutation => Array.from(mutation.addedNodes || []).concat(Array.from(mutation.removedNodes || [])).some(node => {
22098:             if (node?.nodeType !== 1) return false;
22099:             if (node.matches?.(activitySelector)) return true;
22100:             return Boolean(node.querySelector?.(activitySelector));
22101:         }));
22102:         if (!relevant) return;
22103:         try { doc.querySelectorAll('iframe, frame').forEach(observeMissionValueFrame); } catch (err) {}
22104:         scheduleMissionValueScan(50);
22105:         }));
22106:         observer.observe(root, { childList: true, subtree: true });
22107:     }
22108: 
22109:     function installMissionValueWindows() {
22110:         if (!missionValueFeatureInstalled) {
22111:         missionValueFeatureInstalled = true;
22112:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
22113:             runtimeClearTimeout(missionValueScanTimer);
22114:             missionValueScanTimer = null;
22115:             clearMissionValueIndicators();
22116:             clearMissionValueDocumentStyles();
22117:         });
22118:         }
22119:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) observeMissionValueDocument(context.doc);
22120:         scheduleMissionValueScan(0);
22121:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionValueScan(0), 180);
22122:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionValueScan(0), 800);
22123:     }
22124: 
22125: 
22126:     // Issue #133 clean-room live mission requirements matrix.
22127:     // MissionChief's active mission DOM is authoritative. Unknown labels remain unresolved.

22194:         { key: 'eod-heavy', label: 'EOD Heavy Equipment Vehicle', aliases: ['EOD Heavy Equipment Vehicle', 'EOD Heavy Equipment Vehicles'], types: [112] },

22196:         { key: 'marine-eod-equipment', label: 'Marine EOD Equipment Van', aliases: ['Marine EOD Equipment Van', 'Marine EOD Equipment Vans'], types: [114] },
22197:         // MissionChief exposes these roles in native missing-personnel text, but does not
22198:         // currently expose a trustworthy role-specific selected-capacity contract here.
22199:         // Parse and display them without making false coverage claims.
22200:         { key: 'public-order-level-1', label: 'Level 1 Public Order Officer', aliases: ['Level 1 Public Order Officer', 'Level 1 Public Order Officers'], group: 'staff', types: [], countable: false },
22201:         { key: 'public-order-level-2', label: 'Level 2 Public Order Officer', aliases: ['Level 2 Public Order Officer', 'Level 2 Public Order Officers'], group: 'staff', types: [], countable: false },
22202:         { key: 'police-medic-personnel', label: 'Police Medic', aliases: ['Police Medic', 'Police Medics'], group: 'staff', types: [], countable: false },
22203:         { key: 'police-sergeant-personnel', label: 'Police Sergeant', aliases: ['Police Sergeant', 'Police Sergeants'], group: 'staff', types: [], countable: false },
22204:         { key: 'police-inspector-personnel', label: 'Police Inspector', aliases: ['Police Inspector', 'Police Inspectors'], group: 'staff', types: [], countable: false },
22205:         { key: 'search-advisor-personnel', label: 'Search Advisor', aliases: ['Search Advisor', 'Search Advisors'], group: 'staff', types: [], countable: false },
22206:         { key: 'sar-commander-personnel', label: 'SAR Commander', aliases: ['SAR Commander', 'SAR Commanders'], group: 'staff', types: [], countable: false },
22207:         { key: 'firefighters', label: 'Firefighters', aliases: ['more firefighter', 'more firefighters', 'Firefighter', 'Firefighters'], group: 'staff', types: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 23, 26, 35, 36, 37, 38, 39, 40] },
22208:         { key: 'armed-personnel', label: 'Armed Response Personnel', aliases: ['Armed Response Personnel (In Armed Vehicles)', 'Armed Response Personnel'], group: 'staff', types: [13, 25, 52, 56, 82] },
22209:         { key: 'police-officers', label: 'Police Officers', aliases: ['Police Officer', 'Police Officers'], group: 'staff', types: [8, 12, 13, 19, 24, 25, 51, 52, 53, 55, 56, 82, 116] },
22210:         { key: 'paramedics', label: 'Paramedics', aliases: ['Paramedic', 'Paramedics'], group: 'staff', types: [5, 9, 20, 27, 28, 31, 34, 81, 83, 95, 96] },
22211:         { key: 'search-technicians', label: 'Search Technicians', aliases: ['Search Technician', 'Search Technicians'], group: 'staff', types: [86, 87, 92, 93, 99, 101, 102] },
22212:         { key: 'water-resource', label: 'Water', aliases: ['Water', 'litres of water', 'liters of water'], group: 'other', bar: 'water' },
22213:         { key: 'foam-resource', label: 'Foam', aliases: ['Foam', 'litres of foam', 'liters of foam'], group: 'other', bar: 'foam' },
22214:         { key: 'pump-resource', label: 'Pumping Capacity', aliases: ['l/min pumping process', 'l/min pumping capacity', 'Pumping Capacity'], group: 'other', bar: 'pump' }
22215:     ].map(definition => Object.freeze({ group: 'vehicles', aliases: [], types: [], equipment: [], factors: {}, ...definition })));
22216: 
22217:     function missionRequirementsEscapeRegex(value) {
22218:         return String(value || '').replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
22219:     }
22220: 
22221:     function missionRequirementsNumber(value) {
22222:         const digits = String(value ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/g, '');
22223:         const number = Number.parseInt(digits, 10);
22224:         return Number.isFinite(number) ? Math.max(0, number) : 0;
22225:     }
22226: 
22227:     function missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(value) {
22228:         const text = String(value ?? '').trim();
22229:         if (!/\d/u.test(text)) return null;
22230:         return missionRequirementsNumber(text);
22231:     }
22232: 
22233:     function missionRequirementsCapacity(min = 0, max = min, known = null) {
22234:         const safeMin = Math.max(0, Number(min) || 0);
22235:         let safeMax = max === null || max === undefined ? null : Math.max(safeMin, Number(max) || 0);
22236:         if (safeMax !== null && !Number.isFinite(safeMax)) safeMax = null;
22237:         const exact = known === true ? true : known === false ? false : safeMax !== null && safeMin === safeMax;
22238:         return { min: safeMin, max: safeMax, known: exact, value: safeMin };
22239:     }
22240: 
22241:     function missionRequirementsCapacityText(capacity) {
22242:         const value = missionRequirementsCapacity(capacity?.min ?? capacity?.value ?? 0, capacity?.max, capacity?.known);
22243:         if (value.known || value.max === value.min) return value.min.toLocaleString('en-GB');
22244:         if (value.max === null) return value.min > 0 ? `${value.min.toLocaleString('en-GB')}+` : '?';
22245:         return `${value.min.toLocaleString('en-GB')}–${value.max.toLocaleString('en-GB')}`;
22246:     }
22247: 
22248:     function missionRequirementsCoverageRow(requirement, selectedCapacity, respondingCapacity, onSiteCapacity = null, requiredCapacity = null) {
22249:         const missing = Math.max(0, Number(requirement?.missing) || 0);
22250:         const selected = missionRequirementsCapacity(selectedCapacity?.min ?? selectedCapacity?.value ?? 0, selectedCapacity?.max, selectedCapacity?.known);
22251:         const responding = missionRequirementsCapacity(respondingCapacity?.min ?? respondingCapacity?.value ?? 0, respondingCapacity?.max, respondingCapacity?.known);
22252:         const onSite = missionRequirementsCapacity(onSiteCapacity?.min ?? onSiteCapacity?.value ?? 0, onSiteCapacity?.max, onSiteCapacity?.known);
22253:         const derivedRequiredMin = missing + onSite.min;
22254:         const derivedRequiredMax = onSite.max === null ? null : missing + onSite.max;
22255:         const required = requiredCapacity
22256:             ? missionRequirementsCapacity(requiredCapacity?.min ?? requiredCapacity?.value ?? derivedRequiredMin, requiredCapacity?.max, requiredCapacity?.known)
22257:             : missionRequirementsCapacity(derivedRequiredMin, derivedRequiredMax, onSite.known && derivedRequiredMax !== null && derivedRequiredMin === derivedRequiredMax);
22258:         const fulfilledMin = onSite.min + responding.min + selected.min;
22259:         const fulfilledMax = onSite.max === null || responding.max === null || selected.max === null
22260:             ? null
22261:             : onSite.max + responding.max + selected.max;
22262:         const covered = required.max !== null && fulfilledMin >= required.max;
22263:         const definitelyOpen = !covered && fulfilledMax !== null && fulfilledMax < required.min;
22264:         const uncertain = !covered && !definitelyOpen;
22265:         const stillMin = fulfilledMax === null ? 0 : Math.max(0, required.min - fulfilledMax);
22266:         const stillMax = required.max === null ? null : Math.max(0, required.max - fulfilledMin);
22267:         const stillKnown = covered || (stillMax !== null && stillMin === stillMax && required.known && onSite.known && responding.known && selected.known);
22268:         const still = missionRequirementsCapacity(stillMin, stillMax, stillKnown);
22269:         const partial = !covered && fulfilledMin > 0;
22270:         return {
22271:             ...requirement,
22272:             required: required.min,
22273:             requiredMin: required.min,
22274:             requiredMax: required.max,
22275:             requiredKnown: required.known,
22276:             requiredText: missionRequirementsCapacityText(required),
22277:             onSite: onSite.min,
22278:             onSiteMin: onSite.min,
22279:             onSiteMax: onSite.max,
22280:             onSiteKnown: onSite.known,
22281:             onSiteText: missionRequirementsCapacityText(onSite),
22282:             responding: responding.min,
22283:             respondingMin: responding.min,
22284:             respondingMax: responding.max,
22285:             respondingKnown: responding.known,
22286:             respondingText: missionRequirementsCapacityText(responding),
22287:             enRoute: responding.min,
22288:             enRouteMin: responding.min,
22289:             enRouteMax: responding.max,
22290:             enRouteKnown: responding.known,
22291:             enRouteText: missionRequirementsCapacityText(responding),
22292:             selected: selected.min,
22293:             selectedMin: selected.min,
22294:             selectedMax: selected.max,
22295:             selectedKnown: selected.known,
22296:             selectedText: missionRequirementsCapacityText(selected),
22297:             stillNeeded: still.max === null ? still.min : still.max,
22298:             stillNeededMin: still.min,
22299:             stillNeededMax: still.max,
22300:             stillNeededKnown: still.known,
22301:             stillNeededText: missionRequirementsCapacityText(still),
22302:             covered,
22303:             definitelyOpen,
22304:             uncertain,
22305:             partial,
22306:             coverageKnown: covered || definitelyOpen
22307:         };
22308:     }
22309: 
22310:     function missionRequirementsCleanRemaining(value) {
22311:         return String(value || '')
22312:         .replace(/\b(?:we\s+need|needed|required)\b\s*:*/giu, ' ')
22313:         .replace(/\s*[,;]\s*(?=[,;]|$)/gu, ' ')
22314:         .replace(/^(?:\s|[,;.])+|(?:\s|[,;.])+$/gu, '')
22315:         .replace(/\s+/gu, ' ')
22316:         .trim();
22317:     }
22318: 
22319:     function missionRequirementsFindDefinitionMatch(text, definition) {
22320:         const aliases = Array.from(new Set([definition.label, ...(definition.aliases || [])]))
22321:         .filter(Boolean)
22322:         .sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length)
22323:         .map(missionRequirementsEscapeRegex);
22324:         if (!aliases.length) return null;
22325:         const numberPattern = '(\\d{1,3}(?:[\\s,.]\\d{3})*|\\d+)';
22326:         const labelPattern = aliases.join('|');
22327:         const prefix = '(^|[,;]\\s*)';
22328:         const suffix = '(?=\\s*(?:[,;]|$))';
22329:         const before = new RegExp(
22330:         `${prefix}\\s*(?:at\\s+least\\s+)?(?:x\\s*)?${numberPattern}\\s*(?:x\\s*)?(${labelPattern})${suffix}`,
22331:             'iu'
22332:         );
22333:         const after = new RegExp(
22334:         `${prefix}\\s*(${labelPattern})\\s*(?::|x)\\s*${numberPattern}${suffix}`,
22335:             'iu'
22336:         );
22337:         const beforeMatch = before.exec(text);
22338:         const afterMatch = after.exec(text);
22339:         const candidates = [];
22340:         if (beforeMatch) candidates.push({
22341:         index: beforeMatch.index,
22342:         length: beforeMatch[0].length,
22343:         missing: missionRequirementsNumber(beforeMatch[2]),
22344:         label: beforeMatch[3]
22345:         });
22346:         if (afterMatch) candidates.push({
22347:         index: afterMatch.index,
22348:         length: afterMatch[0].length,
22349:         missing: missionRequirementsNumber(afterMatch[3]),
22350:         label: afterMatch[2]
22351:         });
22352:         return candidates.sort((a, b) => a.index - b.index || b.length - a.length)[0] || null;
22353:     }
22354: 
22355:     function missionRequirementsParseText(rawText, group = 'vehicles') {
22356:         const normalized = String(rawText ?? '')
22357:         .replace(/\r/g, '')
22358:         .replace(/\n+/g, '; ')
22359:         .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
22360:         .trim();
22361:         if (!normalized) return { requirements: [], remaining: '' };
22362:         let working = normalized;
22363:         const requirements = [];
22364:         while (true) {
22365:         let best = null;
22366:         for (const definition of MISSION_REQUIREMENT_DEFINITIONS) {
22367:             if ((definition.group || 'vehicles') !== group) continue;
22368:             const found = missionRequirementsFindDefinitionMatch(working, definition);
22369:             if (!found) continue;
22370:             if (!best || found.index < best.found.index || (found.index === best.found.index && found.length > best.found.length)) {
22371:                 best = { definition, found };
22372:             }
22373:         }
22374:         if (!best) break;
22375:         requirements.push({
22376:             key: best.definition.key,
22377:             requirement: best.definition.label,
22378:             missing: best.found.missing,
22379:             group,
22380:             definition: best.definition,
22381:             sourceIndex: best.found.index
22382:         });
22383:         working = `${working.slice(0, best.found.index)}${' '.repeat(best.found.length)}${working.slice(best.found.index + best.found.length)}`;
22384:         }
22385:         requirements.sort((a, b) => a.sourceIndex - b.sourceIndex);
22386:         requirements.forEach(requirement => { delete requirement.sourceIndex; });
22387:         return { requirements, remaining: missionRequirementsCleanRemaining(working) };
22388:     }
22389: 
22390:     function missionRequirementsElementText(element) {
22391:         if (!element) return '';
22392:         const rendered = typeof element.innerText === 'string' && element.innerText.trim()
22393:         ? element.innerText
22394:         : element.textContent;
22395:         return String(rendered || '').replace(/\u00a0/gu, ' ').trim();
22396:     }
22397: 
22398:     function missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(value, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22399:         const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
22400:         if (normalized === 'personnel' || normalized === 'staff') return 'staff';
22401:         if (normalized === 'other' || normalized === 'resource' || normalized === 'resources') return 'other';
22402:         if (normalized === 'vehicle' || normalized === 'vehicles') return 'vehicles';
22403:         return fallback;
22404:     }
22405: 
22406:     function missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22407:         const normalized = String(text || '').toLowerCase();
22408:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+(?:personnel|staff)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22409:         if (/\b(?:officers?|firefighters?|paramedics?|technicians?|commanders?|sergeants?|inspectors?|medics?|advisors?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22410:         if (/\b(?:litres?|liters?|water|foam|pumping\s+capacity|resources?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'other';
22411:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+vehicles?\b/.test(normalized)) return 'vehicles';
22412:         return fallback;
22413:     }
22414: 
22415:     function missionRequirementsStripGroupHeading(text) {
22416:         return String(text || '')
22417:         .replace(/^\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(?:vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/iu, '')
22418:         .trim();
22419:     }
22420: 
22421:     function missionRequirementsSplitTextSections(rawText, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22422:         const text = String(rawText || '').replace(/\r/g, '').trim();
22423:         if (!text) return [];
22424:         const heading = /(?:^|[\n;])\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/giu;
22425:         const matches = Array.from(text.matchAll(heading));
22426:         if (!matches.length) return [{ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback), text }];
22427:         const sections = [];
22428:         const prefix = text.slice(0, matches[0].index).trim();
22429:         if (prefix) sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(prefix, fallback), text: prefix });
22430:         matches.forEach((match, index) => {
22431:         const start = match.index + match[0].length;
22432:         const end = index + 1 < matches.length ? matches[index + 1].index : text.length;
22433:         const sectionText = text.slice(start, end).trim();
22434:         if (!sectionText) return;
22435:         sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(match[1], fallback), text: sectionText });
22436:         });
22437:         return sections;
22438:     }
22439: 
22440:     function missionRequirementsParseGenericText(rawText, group) {
22441:         let working = String(rawText || '').replace(/\r/g, '').replace(/\n+/g, '; ').trim();
22442:         if (!working) return { requirements: [], remaining: '' };
22443:         const number = '(\\d{1,3}(?:[\\s,.]\\d{3})*|\\d+)';
22444:         const patterns = [
22445:         {
22446:             expression: new RegExp(`(^|[,;]\\s*)\\s*(?:at\\s+least\\s+)?(?:x\\s*)?${number}\\s*(?:x\\s*)?\\s+([^,;]+?)(?=\\s*(?:[,;]|$))`, 'giu'),
22447:             quantity: 2,
22448:             label: 3
22449:         },
22450:         {
22451:             expression: new RegExp(`(^|[,;]\\s*)\\s*([^,;:]+?)\\s*(?::|x)\\s*${number}(?=\\s*(?:[,;]|$))`, 'giu'),
22452:             quantity: 3,
22453:             label: 2
22454:         }
22455:         ];
22456:         const requirements = [];
22457:         let serial = 0;
22458:         for (const pattern of patterns) {
22459:         pattern.expression.lastIndex = 0;
22460:         let match;
22461:         while ((match = pattern.expression.exec(working))) {
22462:             const missing = missionRequirementsNumber(match[pattern.quantity]);
22463:             const label = String(match[pattern.label] || '')
22464:                 .replace(/^\s*(?:and\s+)?(?:missing|required)\s+/iu, '')
22465:                 .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
22466:                 .trim();
22467:             if (!missing || !label) continue;
22468:             const sourceIndex = match.index;
22469:             const slug = label.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '').slice(0, 48) || 'requirement';
22470:             requirements.push({
22471:                 key: `unmapped-${slug}-${serial++}`,
22472:                 requirement: label,
22473:                 missing,
22474:                 group,
22475:                 definition: { key: `unmapped-${slug}`, label, aliases: [label], group, types: [], equipment: [], factors: {}, countable: false, generic: true },
22476:                 sourceIndex
22477:             });
22478:             working = `${working.slice(0, sourceIndex)}${' '.repeat(match[0].length)}${working.slice(sourceIndex + match[0].length)}`;
22479:             pattern.expression.lastIndex = sourceIndex + match[0].length;
22480:         }
22481:         }
22482:         requirements.sort((a, b) => a.sourceIndex - b.sourceIndex);
22483:         requirements.forEach(requirement => { delete requirement.sourceIndex; });
22484:         return { requirements, remaining: missionRequirementsCleanRemaining(working) };
22485:     }
22486: 
22487:     function missionRequirementsParseSource(source) {
22488:         const requirements = [];
22489:         const unresolved = [];
22490:         const parseSection = (rawText, requestedGroup) => {
22491:         const group = missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(requestedGroup, missionRequirementsInferGroup(rawText, 'vehicles'));
22492:         const cleaned = missionRequirementsStripGroupHeading(rawText);
22493:         if (!cleaned) return;
22494:         const parsed = missionRequirementsParseText(cleaned, group);
22495:         requirements.push(...parsed.requirements);
22496:         const generic = missionRequirementsParseGenericText(parsed.remaining, group);
22497:         requirements.push(...generic.requirements);
22498:         if (generic.remaining) unresolved.push({ group, text: generic.remaining });
22499:         };
22500: 
22501:         const allGroups = Array.from(source?.querySelectorAll?.('[data-requirement-type]') || []);
22502:         const groupElements = allGroups.filter(element => {
22503:         const closest = element.closest?.('#missing_text');
22504:         return !closest || closest === source;
22505:         });
22506:         if (groupElements.length) {
22507:         for (const element of groupElements) {
22508:             const rawGroup = element.getAttribute?.('data-requirement-type') || element.dataset?.requirementType || 'vehicles';
22509:             parseSection(missionRequirementsElementText(element), rawGroup);
22510:         }
22511:         } else {
22512:         const raw = missionRequirementsElementText(source);
22513:         for (const section of missionRequirementsSplitTextSections(raw, 'vehicles')) parseSection(section.text, section.group);
22514:         }
22515:         return { requirements, unresolved };
22516:     }
22517: 
22518:     function missionRequirementsVehicleType(element) {
22519:         const scopes = [];
22520:         const addScope = scope => {
22521:         if (scope && !scopes.includes(scope)) scopes.push(scope);
22522:         };
22523:         addScope(element);
22524:         addScope(element?.closest?.('tr'));
22525:         addScope(element?.closest?.('[vehicle_type_id], [data-vehicle-type-id], [data-vehicle_type_id]'));
22526:         const read = scope => missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(
22527:         scope?.getAttribute?.('vehicle_type_id')
22528:         ?? scope?.getAttribute?.('data-vehicle-type-id')
22529:         ?? scope?.getAttribute?.('data-vehicle_type_id')
22530:         ?? scope?.dataset?.vehicleTypeId
22531:         ?? scope?.dataset?.vehicle_type_id
22532:         );
22533:         for (const scope of scopes) {
22534:         const direct = read(scope);
22535:         if (direct !== null && direct >= 0) return direct;
22536:         const nested = scope?.querySelector?.('[vehicle_type_id], [data-vehicle-type-id], [data-vehicle_type_id]');
22537:         const nestedType = read(nested);
22538:         if (nestedType !== null && nestedType >= 0) return nestedType;
22539:         }
22540:         return -1;
22541:     }
22542: 
22543:     function missionRequirementsVehicleId(element) {
22544:         const scopes = Array.from(new Set([element, element?.closest?.('tr')].filter(Boolean)));
22545:         const attributes = ['vehicle_id', 'data-vehicle-id', 'data-vehicle_id'];
22546:         for (const scope of scopes) {
22547:         for (const raw of [scope?.value, scope?.getAttribute?.('value'), scope?.dataset?.vehicleId, scope?.dataset?.vehicle_id]) {
22548:             const value = Number.parseInt(raw, 10);
22549:             if (Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0) return value;
22550:         }
22551:         for (const attribute of attributes) {
22552:             const value = Number.parseInt(scope?.getAttribute?.(attribute), 10);
22553:             if (Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0) return value;
22554:         }
22555:         const idMatch = String(scope?.id || '').match(/(?:^|[_-])vehicle[_-]?(\d+)(?:$|[_-])/iu);
22556:         if (idMatch) return Number(idMatch[1]);
22557:         const link = scope?.matches?.('a[href*="/vehicles/"]') ? scope : scope?.querySelector?.('a[href*="/vehicles/"]');
22558:         const hrefMatch = String(link?.getAttribute?.('href') || link?.href || '').match(/\/vehicles\/(\d+)(?:\/|$)/u);
22559:         if (hrefMatch) return Number(hrefMatch[1]);
22560:         }
22561:         return -1;
22562:     }
22563: 
22564:     function missionRequirementsEquipmentTypes(element) {
22565:         const values = new Set();
22566:         const add = raw => String(raw || '').split(',').map(value => value.trim().toLowerCase()).filter(Boolean).forEach(value => values.add(value));
22567:         const scopes = Array.from(new Set([element, element?.closest?.('tr')].filter(Boolean)));
22568:         for (const scope of scopes) {
22569:         add(scope?.dataset?.equipmentType);
22570:         add(scope?.dataset?.equipmentTypes);
22571:         add(scope?.getAttribute?.('data-equipment-type'));
22572:         add(scope?.getAttribute?.('data-equipment-types'));
22573:         scope?.querySelectorAll?.('[data-equipment-type], [data-equipment-types]').forEach(node => {
22574:             add(node.getAttribute('data-equipment-type'));
22575:             add(node.getAttribute('data-equipment-types'));
22576:         });
22577:         }
22578:         return values;
22579:     }
22580: 
22581:     function missionRequirementsStaffCapacity(element) {
22582:         const row = element?.closest?.('tr') || element;
22583:         const crewCell = row?.querySelector?.('[data-personnel-count], [data-current-personnel], [data-min-personnel], [data-max-personnel], [data-min-crew], [data-max-crew], td:nth-of-type(5)[sortvalue]');
22584:         const scopes = Array.from(new Set([element, row, crewCell].filter(Boolean)));
22585:         const exactAttributes = ['data-personnel-count', 'data-current-personnel', 'data-personnel', 'data-staff', 'data-crew'];
22586:         for (const scope of scopes) {
22587:         for (const attribute of exactAttributes) {
22588:             const value = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(scope.getAttribute?.(attribute));
22589:             if (value !== null) return missionRequirementsCapacity(value, value, true);
22590:         }
22591:         }
22592:         let min = null;
22593:         let max = null;
22594:         for (const scope of scopes) {
22595:         if (min === null) min = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(scope.getAttribute?.('data-min-personnel') ?? scope.getAttribute?.('data-min-crew'));
22596:         if (max === null) max = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(scope.getAttribute?.('data-max-personnel') ?? scope.getAttribute?.('data-max-crew'));
22597:         }
22598:         if (min !== null || max !== null) return missionRequirementsCapacity(min ?? 0, max, min !== null && max !== null && min === max);
22599:         const text = String(crewCell?.textContent || '').trim();
22600:         const currentMaximum = text.match(/(\d[\d,.]*)\s*\/\s*(\d[\d,.]*)/u);
22601:         if (currentMaximum) {
22602:         const current = missionRequirementsNumber(currentMaximum[1]);
22603:         return missionRequirementsCapacity(current, current, true);
22604:         }
22605:         const bounded = text.match(/(\d[\d,.]*)\s*(?:-|–|to)\s*(\d[\d,.]*)/iu);
22606:         if (bounded) return missionRequirementsCapacity(missionRequirementsNumber(bounded[1]), missionRequirementsNumber(bounded[2]), false);
22607:         const visible = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(text);
22608:         if (visible !== null) return missionRequirementsCapacity(visible, visible, true);
22609:         const sortValue = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(crewCell?.getAttribute?.('sortvalue'));
22610:         if (sortValue !== null) return missionRequirementsCapacity(sortValue, sortValue, true);
22611:         return null;
22612:     }
22613: 
22614:     function missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, mode) {
22615:         const root = candidate?.root;
22616:         const doc = candidate?.source?.ownerDocument || root?.ownerDocument;
22617:         if (!root?.querySelectorAll && !doc?.querySelectorAll) return [];
22618:         const selector = mode === 'selected'
22619:             ? '#vehicle_show_table_body_all .vehicle_checkbox:checked, #occupied .vehicle_checkbox:checked, .vehicle_checkbox:checked'
22620:             : mode === 'onsite'
22621:                 ? '#mission_vehicle_at_mission tbody tr'
22622:                 : '#mission_vehicle_driving tbody tr';
22623:         const elements = [];
22624:         const seenElements = new Set();
22625:         const missionScopes = Array.from(new Set([root, candidate?.mount].filter(scope => scope?.querySelectorAll)));
22626:         const scopes = missionScopes.length ? missionScopes : [doc].filter(scope => scope?.querySelectorAll);
22627:         for (const scope of scopes) {
22628:             for (const element of Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll?.(selector) || [])) {
22629:                 if (seenElements.has(element)) continue;
22630:                 seenElements.add(element);
22631:                 elements.push(element);
22632:             }
22633:         }
22634: 
22635:         const units = new Map();
22636:         elements.forEach((element, index) => {
22637:             const row = element.matches?.('tr') ? element : element.closest?.('tr');
22638:             const vehicleElement = mode === 'selected'
22639:                 ? element
22640:                 : (element.querySelector?.('[vehicle_type_id], [data-vehicle-type-id], [data-vehicle_type_id]') || element);
22641:             const typeId = missionRequirementsVehicleType(vehicleElement);
22642:             if (typeId < 0) return;
22643:             const vehicleId = missionRequirementsVehicleId(vehicleElement);
22644:             const tractiveId = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(
22645:                 vehicleElement?.getAttribute?.('tractive_vehicle_id')
22646:                 ?? vehicleElement?.getAttribute?.('data-tractive-vehicle-id')
22647:                 ?? row?.getAttribute?.('tractive_vehicle_id')
22648:                 ?? row?.getAttribute?.('data-tractive-vehicle-id')
22649:                 ?? row?.dataset?.tractiveVehicleId
22650:             );
22651:             const trailerId = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(
22652:                 vehicleElement?.getAttribute?.('trailer_id')
22653:                 ?? vehicleElement?.getAttribute?.('data-trailer-id')
22654:                 ?? row?.getAttribute?.('trailer_id')
22655:                 ?? row?.getAttribute?.('data-trailer-id')
22656:                 ?? row?.dataset?.trailerId
22657:             );
22658:             let contributionKey = vehicleId >= 0 ? `vehicle:${vehicleId}` : `element:${index}`;
22659:             const pairedId = tractiveId !== null && tractiveId >= 0 ? tractiveId : trailerId;
22660:             if (vehicleId >= 0 && pairedId !== null && pairedId >= 0) contributionKey = `pair:${Math.min(vehicleId, pairedId)}:${Math.max(vehicleId, pairedId)}`;
22661:             const identityKey = vehicleId >= 0 ? `vehicle:${vehicleId}` : contributionKey;
22662:             const unit = {
22663:                 typeId,
22664:                 vehicleId,
22665:                 tractiveId,
22666:                 equipment: missionRequirementsEquipmentTypes(vehicleElement),
22667:                 staff: missionRequirementsStaffCapacity(vehicleElement),
22668:                 contributionKey
22669:             };
22670:             const existing = units.get(identityKey);
22671:             if (!existing) {
22672:                 units.set(identityKey, unit);
22673:                 return;
22674:             }
22675:             if (existing.typeId < 0 && unit.typeId >= 0) existing.typeId = unit.typeId;
22676:             for (const equipment of unit.equipment) existing.equipment.add(equipment);
22677:             if ((!existing.staff || !existing.staff.known) && unit.staff?.known) existing.staff = unit.staff;
22678:             if (existing.contributionKey.startsWith('element:') && !unit.contributionKey.startsWith('element:')) existing.contributionKey = unit.contributionKey;
22679:         });
22680:         return Array.from(units.values());
22681:     }
22682: 
22683:     function missionRequirementsMissionTypeId(candidate) {
22684:         const scopes = [candidate?.root, candidate?.mount].filter(Boolean);
22685:         const attributes = ['mission_type_id', 'data-mission-type-id', 'data-mission_type_id'];
22686:         for (const scope of scopes) {
22687:         for (const attribute of attributes) {
22688:             const value = Number.parseInt(scope.getAttribute?.(attribute), 10);
22689:             if (Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0) return value;
22690:         }
22691:         const node = scope.querySelector?.('[mission_type_id], [data-mission-type-id], [data-mission_type_id], input[name="mission_type_id"]');
22692:         if (node) {
22693:             for (const raw of [node.getAttribute?.('mission_type_id'), node.getAttribute?.('data-mission-type-id'), node.getAttribute?.('data-mission_type_id'), node.value]) {
22694:                 const value = Number.parseInt(raw, 10);
22695:                 if (Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0) return value;
22696:             }
22697:         }
22698:         }
22699:         const runtimeValue = Number.parseInt(pageWindow.missionTypeId ?? pageWindow.mission_type_id, 10);
22700:         return Number.isFinite(runtimeValue) && runtimeValue >= 0 ? runtimeValue : null;
22701:     }
22702: 
22703:     function missionRequirementsDefinitionCondition(definition, candidate) {
22704:         const included = Array.from(definition?.missionTypes || []).map(Number).filter(Number.isFinite);
22705:         const excluded = Array.from(definition?.excludedMissionTypes || []).map(Number).filter(Number.isFinite);
22706:         if (!included.length && !excluded.length) return true;
22707:         const missionTypeId = missionRequirementsMissionTypeId(candidate);
22708:         if (missionTypeId === null) return null;
22709:         if (included.length && !included.includes(missionTypeId)) return false;
22710:         if (excluded.includes(missionTypeId)) return false;
22711:         return true;
22712:     }
22713: 
22714:     function missionRequirementsUnitContribution(requirement, unit) {
22715:         const definition = requirement.definition || {};
22716:         const typeEligible = Array.from(definition.types || []).includes(unit.typeId);
22717:         const equipmentEligible = Array.from(definition.equipment || []).some(equipment => unit.equipment.has(String(equipment).toLowerCase()));
22718:         if (!typeEligible && !equipmentEligible) return { eligible: false, capacity: missionRequirementsCapacity(0, 0, true) };
22719:         if (requirement.group === 'staff') {
22720:         const capacity = unit.staff
22721:             ? missionRequirementsCapacity(unit.staff.min ?? unit.staff.value ?? 0, unit.staff.max, unit.staff.known)
22722:             : missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false);
22723:         return { eligible: true, capacity };
22724:         }
22725:         const factor = Number(definition.factors?.[unit.typeId] ?? definition.factors?.[String(unit.typeId)] ?? 1);
22726:         const value = Number.isFinite(factor) && factor > 0 ? factor : 1;
22727:         return { eligible: true, capacity: missionRequirementsCapacity(value, value, true) };
22728:     }
22729: 
22730:     function missionRequirementsAggregate(requirement, units) {
22731:         const contributions = new Map();
22732:         for (const unit of units) {
22733:         const contribution = missionRequirementsUnitContribution(requirement, unit);
22734:         if (!contribution.eligible) continue;
22735:         const capacity = contribution.capacity;
22736:         const existing = contributions.get(unit.contributionKey);
22737:         if (!existing) {
22738:             contributions.set(unit.contributionKey, capacity);
22739:             continue;
22740:         }
22741:         const pairMin = Math.max(existing.min, capacity.min);
22742:         const pairMax = existing.max === null || capacity.max === null ? null : Math.max(existing.max, capacity.max);
22743:         contributions.set(unit.contributionKey, missionRequirementsCapacity(pairMin, pairMax, existing.known && capacity.known && pairMax === pairMin));
22744:         }
22745:         let min = 0;
22746:         let max = 0;
22747:         let exact = true;
22748:         for (const capacity of contributions.values()) {
22749:         min += capacity.min;
22750:         if (max === null || capacity.max === null) max = null;
22751:         else max += capacity.max;
22752:         exact = exact && capacity.known;
22753:         }
22754:         return missionRequirementsCapacity(min, max, exact && max !== null && min === max);
22755:     }
22756: 
22757:     function missionRequirementsProgressValue(candidate, bar, metric) {
22758:         const root = candidate?.root?.isConnected ? candidate.root : candidate?.mount;
22759:         const holder = root?.querySelector?.(`[id^="mission_${bar}_holder"]`);
22760:         if (!holder) return null;
22761:         const node = holder.querySelector?.(`[class*="mission_${bar}_bar_${metric}_"], [class*="mission_water_bar_${metric}_"]`);
22762:         return node ? missionRequirementsNumber(node.textContent) : null;
22763:     }
22764: 
22765:     function missionRequirementsUnknownCoverageRow(requirement) {
22766:         const missing = Math.max(0, missionRequirementsNumber(requirement?.missing));
22767:         return {
22768:         ...requirement,
22769:         missing,
22770:         missingText: missing.toLocaleString('en-GB'),
22771:         selectedMin: 0,
22772:         selectedMax: null,
22773:         selectedKnown: false,
22774:         selectedText: '?',
22775:         enRouteMin: 0,
22776:         enRouteMax: null,
22777:         enRouteKnown: false,
22778:         enRouteText: '?',
22779:         stillNeededMin: 0,
22780:         stillNeededMax: missing,
22781:         stillNeededText: '?',
22782:         covered: false,
22783:         definitelyOpen: false,
22784:         uncertain: true
22785:         };
22786:     }
22787: 
22788: 
22789:     const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_TTL_MS = 6 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
22790:     const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_STALE_MS = 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
22791:     const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_RETRY_MS = 60 * 1000;
22792:     const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_CACHE_LIMIT = 96;
22793:     const missionRequirementsCatalogueCache = new Map();
22794: 
22795:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueText(node) {
22796:         return String(node?.textContent || node?.innerText || '').replace(/\s+/gu, ' ').trim();
22797:     }
22798: 
22799:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueDescriptor(candidate) {
22800:         const scopes = [candidate?.root, candidate?.mount].filter(Boolean);
22801:         let matched = null;
22802:         for (const scope of scopes) {
22803:             const links = Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll?.('a[href*="/einsaetze/"]') || []);
22804:             for (const link of links) {
22805:                 const href = String(link.getAttribute?.('href') || link.href || '');
22806:                 const match = href.match(/\/einsaetze\/(\d+)(?:\?[^#]*\boverlay_index=(\d+))?/iu);
22807:                 if (!match) continue;
22808:                 matched = { id: Number(match[1]), overlayIndex: match[2] === undefined ? null : Number(match[2]) };
22809:                 break;
22810:             }
22811:             if (matched) break;
22812:         }
22813:         if (!matched) {
22814:             const id = missionRequirementsMissionTypeId(candidate);
22815:             if (id === null || id === undefined || !Number.isFinite(Number(id)) || Number(id) < 0) return null;
22816:             matched = { id: Number(id), overlayIndex: null };
22817:         }
22818:         const doc = candidate?.root?.ownerDocument || candidate?.mount?.ownerDocument;
22819:         const location = doc?.defaultView?.location || pageWindow.location || {};
22820:         const origin = location.origin || `${location.protocol || 'https:'}//${location.host || 'www.missionchief.co.uk'}`;
22821:         const path = `/einsaetze/${matched.id}${matched.overlayIndex === null ? '' : `?overlay_index=${matched.overlayIndex}`}`;
22822:         return { ...matched, origin, path, url: `${origin}${path}`, key: `${origin}${path}` };
22823:     }
22824: 
22825:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueRequirement(label, value) {
22826:         const rawLabel = missionRequirementsCatalogueText({ textContent: label });
22827:         const rawValue = missionRequirementsCatalogueText({ textContent: value });
22828:         const quantityMatch = rawValue.match(/^\s*(\d+(?:[\s,.]\d{3})*)/u);
22829:         const quantity = quantityMatch ? missionRequirementsNumber(quantityMatch[1]) : null;
22830:         if (quantity === null) return null;
22831:         const cleanedLabel = rawLabel
22832:             .replace(/^(?:required|requirement\s+of|needed)\s+/iu, '')
22833:             .replace(/\s*\([^)]*%[^)]*\)\s*$/u, '')
22834:             .trim();
22835:         if (!cleanedLabel) return null;
22836:         const probabilityMatch = `${rawLabel} ${rawValue}`.match(/(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*%/u);
22837:         const probability = probabilityMatch ? Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(probabilityMatch[1]))) : 100;
22838:         const sourceText = `${quantity} ${cleanedLabel}`;
22839:         for (const group of ['vehicles', 'staff', 'other']) {
22840:             const parsed = missionRequirementsParseText(sourceText, group);
22841:             if (!parsed.requirements.length) continue;
22842:             const requirement = parsed.requirements[0];
22843:             return {
22844:                 ...requirement,
22845:                 missing: quantity,
22846:                 baseline: quantity,
22847:                 baselineText: `${quantity.toLocaleString('en-GB')}${probability < 100 ? ` (${probability}% chance)` : ''}`,
22848:                 probability,
22849:                 catalogueLabel: rawLabel,
22850:                 catalogueValue: rawValue,
22851:                 catalogueKnown: true
22852:             };
22853:         }
22854:         const inferredGroup = missionRequirementsInferGroup(cleanedLabel, 'vehicles');
22855:         const key = `catalogue-${cleanedLabel.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/gu, '-').replace(/^-|-$/gu, '').slice(0, 70) || 'unknown'}`;
22856:         return {
22857:             key,
22858:             requirement: cleanedLabel,
22859:             missing: quantity,
22860:             baseline: quantity,
22861:             baselineText: `${quantity.toLocaleString('en-GB')}${probability < 100 ? ` (${probability}% chance)` : ''}`,
22862:             probability,
22863:             group: inferredGroup,
22864:             definition: { key, label: cleanedLabel, aliases: [cleanedLabel], group: inferredGroup, types: [], equipment: [], factors: {}, countable: false },
22865:             catalogueLabel: rawLabel,
22866:             catalogueValue: rawValue,
22867:             catalogueKnown: false
22868:         };
22869:     }
22870: 
22871:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueParseDocument(doc, descriptor = {}) {
22872:         if (!doc?.querySelectorAll) throw new Error('catalogue document unavailable');
22873:         const requirements = [];
22874:         const unresolved = [];
22875:         const preconditions = {};
22876:         const other = {};
22877:         const tables = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('table') || []);
22878:         for (const table of tables) {
22879:             const tableText = missionRequirementsCatalogueText(table);
22880:             let kind = /Vehicle\s+and\s+Personnel\s+Requirements/iu.test(tableText) ? 'requirements'
22881:                 : /Reward\s+and\s+Precondition/iu.test(tableText) ? 'preconditions'
22882:                     : /Other\s+information/iu.test(tableText) ? 'other' : null;
22883:             const rows = Array.from(table.querySelectorAll?.('tr') || []);
22884:             for (const row of rows) {
22885:                 const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll?.('th, td') || []);
22886:                 if (cells.length < 2) continue;
22887:                 const label = missionRequirementsCatalogueText(cells[0]);
22888:                 const value = missionRequirementsCatalogueText(cells[1]);
22889:                 if (!label || /^(?:Value|Vehicle\s+and\s+Personnel\s+Requirements|Reward\s+and\s+Precondition|Other\s+information)$/iu.test(label)) continue;
22890:                 if (!kind && /^(?:Required|Requirement\s+of|Needed)\b/iu.test(label)) kind = 'requirements';
22891:                 if (kind === 'requirements') {
22892:                     const parsed = missionRequirementsCatalogueRequirement(label, value);
22893:                     if (parsed) requirements.push(parsed);
22894:                     else unresolved.push({ label, value });
22895:                 } else if (kind === 'preconditions') {
22896:                     preconditions[label] = value;
22897:                 } else if (kind === 'other') {
22898:                     other[label] = value;
22899:                 }
22900:             }
22901:         }
22902:         const titleNode = doc.querySelector?.('h1, [data-mission-title], .mission-title');
22903:         const title = missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(missionRequirementsCatalogueText(titleNode), 140) || `Mission ${descriptor.id ?? 'Unknown'}`;
22904:         const variationLinks = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/einsaetze/"]') || []);
22905:         const seenVariations = new Set();
22906:         const variations = [];
22907:         for (const link of variationLinks) {
22908:             const href = String(link.getAttribute?.('href') || link.href || '');
22909:             if (!/\/einsaetze\/\d+/u.test(href) || seenVariations.has(href)) continue;
22910:             seenVariations.add(href);
22911:             variations.push({ href: missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(href, 180), title: missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(missionRequirementsCatalogueText(link), 140) });
22912:         }
22913:         const findValue = (source, pattern) => {
22914:             const entry = Object.entries(source).find(([key]) => pattern.test(key));
22915:             return entry ? entry[1] : '';
22916:         };
22917:         return {
22918:             id: descriptor.id ?? null,
22919:             overlayIndex: descriptor.overlayIndex ?? null,
22920:             path: descriptor.path || '',
22921:             url: descriptor.url || '',
22922:             title,
22923:             requirements,
22924:             unresolved,
22925:             preconditions,
22926:             other,
22927:             averageCredits: missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(findValue(preconditions, /Average\s+credits/iu)),
22928:             maxPatients: missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(findValue(other, /Max\.?\s*Patients/iu)),
22929:             patientTransportProbability: missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(findValue(other, /Probability.*transport/iu)),
22930:             variations,
22931:             fetchedAt: Date.now(),
22932:             stale: false
22933:         };
22934:     }
22935: 
22936:     function missionRequirementsCataloguePrune() {
22937:         if (missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.size <= MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_CACHE_LIMIT) return;
22938:         const ordered = Array.from(missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.entries()).sort((a, b) => (a[1]?.touchedAt || 0) - (b[1]?.touchedAt || 0));
22939:         while (ordered.length && missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.size > MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_CACHE_LIMIT) {
22940:             missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.delete(ordered.shift()[0]);
22941:         }
22942:     }
22943:
