22944:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueCacheStore(key, value, now = Date.now()) {
22945:         missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.set(key, {
22946:             value,
22947:             expiresAt: now + MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_TTL_MS,
22948:             staleUntil: now + MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_STALE_MS,
22949:             retryAt: 0,
22950:             promise: null,
22951:             touchedAt: now
22952:         });
22953:         missionRequirementsCataloguePrune();
22954:         return value;
22955:     }
22956: 
22957:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueCacheLookup(key, now = Date.now()) {
22958:         const entry = missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.get(key);
22959:         if (!entry?.value) return null;
22960:         if (now > entry.staleUntil) {
22961:             missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.delete(key);
22962:             return null;
22963:         }
22964:         entry.touchedAt = now;
22965:         return { value: entry.value, stale: now > entry.expiresAt };
22966:     }
22967: 
22968:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueFailureFallback(key, now = Date.now()) {
22969:         return missionRequirementsCatalogueCacheLookup(key, now);
22970:     }
22971: 
22972:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueEnsure(record) {
22973:         const descriptor = missionRequirementsCatalogueDescriptor(record?.candidate);
22974:         const previousKey = record?.catalogueDescriptor?.key || '';
22975:         const nextKey = descriptor?.key || '';
22976:         if (previousKey !== nextKey) {
22977:             record.catalogueRequestToken = (Number(record.catalogueRequestToken) || 0) + 1;
22978:             record.catalogue = null;
22979:             record.catalogueState = nextKey ? 'idle' : 'unavailable';
22980:             record.catalogueError = '';
22981:         }
22982:         record.catalogueDescriptor = descriptor;
22983:         const requestToken = Number(record.catalogueRequestToken) || 0;
22984:         const stillCurrent = () => record?.catalogueDescriptor?.key === descriptor?.key && (Number(record.catalogueRequestToken) || 0) === requestToken;
22985:         if (!descriptor) {
22986:             record.catalogueState = 'unavailable';
22987:             return null;
22988:         }
22989:         const now = Date.now();
22990:         const cached = missionRequirementsCatalogueCacheLookup(descriptor.key, now);
22991:         if (cached) {
22992:             record.catalogue = { ...cached.value, stale: cached.stale };
22993:             record.catalogueState = cached.stale ? 'stale' : 'ready';
22994:             if (!cached.stale) return record.catalogue;
22995:         }
22996:         let entry = missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.get(descriptor.key) || { value: cached?.value || null, retryAt: 0, promise: null, touchedAt: now };
22997:         if (entry.promise) {
22998:             entry.promise.finally(() => missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record));
22999:             return record.catalogue || null;
23000:         }
23001:         if (entry.retryAt > now) return record.catalogue || null;
23002:         const doc = record?.source?.ownerDocument || record?.candidate?.root?.ownerDocument || record?.candidate?.mount?.ownerDocument;
23003:         const view = doc?.defaultView || pageWindow;
23004:         const fetcher = typeof view?.fetch === 'function' ? view.fetch.bind(view) : typeof pageWindow.fetch === 'function' ? pageWindow.fetch.bind(pageWindow) : null;
23005:         const DOMParserCtor = view?.DOMParser || pageWindow.DOMParser;
23006:         if (!fetcher || typeof DOMParserCtor !== 'function') {
23007:             record.catalogueState = record.catalogue ? 'stale' : 'unavailable';
23008:             return record.catalogue || null;
23009:         }
23010:         record.catalogueState = record.catalogue ? 'stale' : 'loading';
23011:         const promise = Promise.resolve(fetcher(descriptor.url, { credentials: 'same-origin', headers: { Accept: 'text/html' } }))
23012:             .then(response => {
23013:                 if (!response || response.ok === false) throw new Error(`catalogue HTTP ${response?.status || 'failure'}`);
23014:                 return response.text();
23015:             })
23016:             .then(html => {
23017:                 const parsedDoc = new DOMParserCtor().parseFromString(String(html || ''), 'text/html');
23018:                 const catalogue = missionRequirementsCatalogueParseDocument(parsedDoc, descriptor);
23019:                 missionRequirementsCatalogueCacheStore(descriptor.key, catalogue);
23020:                 if (!stillCurrent()) return null;
23021:                 record.catalogue = catalogue;
23022:                 record.catalogueState = 'ready';
23023:                 return catalogue;
23024:             })
23025:             .catch(error => {
23026:                 if (!stillCurrent()) return null;
23027:                 const fallback = missionRequirementsCatalogueFailureFallback(descriptor.key);
23028:                 const current = missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.get(descriptor.key) || entry;
23029:                 current.retryAt = Date.now() + MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_RETRY_MS;
23030:                 current.promise = null;
23031:                 current.touchedAt = Date.now();
23032:                 missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.set(descriptor.key, current);
23033:                 record.catalogueError = missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(error?.message || 'catalogue request failed', 160);
23034:                 if (fallback) {
23035:                     record.catalogue = { ...fallback.value, stale: true };
23036:                     record.catalogueState = 'stale';
23037:                     return record.catalogue;
23038:                 }
23039:                 record.catalogueState = 'error';
23040:                 return null;
23041:             })
23042:             .finally(() => { if (stillCurrent()) missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record); });
23043:         entry.promise = promise;
23044:         entry.touchedAt = now;
23045:         missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.set(descriptor.key, entry);
23046:         return record.catalogue || null;
23047:     }
23048: 
23049:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueCompare(parsed, catalogue) {
23050:         if (!catalogue?.requirements?.length) return { state: 'unavailable', summary: 'No catalogue requirements available', issues: [] };
23051:         const baseline = new Map(catalogue.requirements.map(item => [item.key, Number(item.baseline ?? item.missing) || 0]));
23052:         const issues = [];
23053:         for (const live of parsed?.requirements || []) {
23054:             if (!baseline.has(live.key)) issues.push(`Live-only requirement: ${live.requirement}`);
23055:             else if ((Number(live.missing) || 0) > baseline.get(live.key)) issues.push(`Live quantity exceeds catalogue: ${live.requirement}`);
23056:         }
23057:         if (parsed?.unresolved?.length) issues.push(`${parsed.unresolved.length} unresolved live fragment${parsed.unresolved.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
23058:         return { state: issues.length ? 'mismatch' : 'compatible', summary: issues.length ? issues.join('; ') : 'Live requirements are compatible with the catalogue baseline', issues };
23059:     }
23060: 
23061:     function missionRequirementsCataloguePanelHtml(catalogue) {
23062:         const rows = Array.from(catalogue?.requirements || []);
23063:         const stale = catalogue?.stale === true;
23064:         const rowHtml = rows.map(row => `<tr data-row-state="unresolved"><td>${escapeHtml(row.requirement)}</td><td data-label="Catalogue baseline">${escapeHtml(row.baselineText || String(row.baseline ?? row.missing ?? '?'))}</td></tr>`).join('');
23065:         const unresolved = Array.from(catalogue?.unresolved || []);
23066:         const unresolvedHtml = unresolved.length ? `<div class="mcms-req-unknown"><b>Unmapped catalogue entries</b>${unresolved.map(item => `<span>${escapeHtml(`${item.label}: ${item.value}`)}</span>`).join('')}</div>` : '';
23067:         const note = stale
23068:             ? 'Using a cached official catalogue baseline because the latest catalogue request failed. Current outstanding requirements are unavailable.'
23069:             : 'Official MissionChief catalogue baseline only. Current outstanding requirements are unavailable, so do not treat these quantities as still needed.';
23070:         const title = missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(catalogue?.title || '', 100);
23071:         const summary = `${stale ? 'Cached ' : ''}official baseline${title ? ` · ${title}` : ''}`;
23072:         const table = rows.length
23073:             ? `<table aria-label="MissionChief catalogue baseline requirements"><colgroup><col class="mcms-req-name-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"></colgroup><thead><tr><th scope="col">Requirement</th><th scope="col">Catalogue baseline</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rowHtml}</tbody></table>`
23074:             : '<div class="mcms-req-fallback"><span class="mcms-req-fallback-message">The official catalogue lists no fixed vehicle or personnel requirements for this mission.</span></div>';
23075:         return {
23076:             stateName: 'warning',
23077:             widthMode: missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows, unresolved),
23078:             html: `<div class="mcms-req-head"><div class="mcms-req-title"><i aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Mission Requirements</span></div><span class="mcms-req-summary">${escapeHtml(summary)}</span><button type="button" class="mcms-req-collapse" data-mcms-requirements-collapse aria-label="Collapse mission requirements" aria-expanded="true">⌃</button></div><div class="mcms-req-body">${table}<div class="mcms-req-unknown"><b>Baseline planning data</b><span>${escapeHtml(note)}</span></div>${unresolvedHtml}</div>`
23079:         };
23080:     }
23081: 
23082:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueDiagnosticLines(record, parsed) {
23083:         const descriptor = record?.catalogueDescriptor || missionRequirementsCatalogueDescriptor(record?.candidate);
23084:         const catalogue = record?.catalogue;
23085:         const comparison = missionRequirementsCatalogueCompare(parsed, catalogue);
23086:         const rows = Array.from(catalogue?.requirements || []).slice(0, 24).map(item => `  - ${item.requirement}: ${item.baselineText || item.baseline || item.missing}`);
23087:         return [
23088:             '### Official MissionChief catalogue',
23089:             `- State: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(record?.catalogueState || 'not requested', 40)}`,
23090:             `- Definition ID: ${descriptor?.id ?? 'Unavailable'}`,
23091:             `- Overlay index: ${descriptor?.overlayIndex ?? 'None'}`,
23092:             `- Path: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(descriptor?.path || '', 180) || 'Unavailable'}`,
23093:             `- Catalogue title: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(catalogue?.title || '', 140) || 'Unavailable'}`,
23094:             `- Parsed catalogue rows: ${catalogue?.requirements?.length || 0}`,
23095:             `- Unmapped catalogue rows: ${catalogue?.unresolved?.length || 0}`,
23096:             `- Average credits: ${catalogue?.averageCredits ?? 'Unavailable'}`,
23097:             `- Max patients: ${catalogue?.maxPatients ?? 'Unavailable'}`,
23098:             `- Mission variations: ${catalogue?.variations?.length || 0}`,
23099:             `- Live/catalogue comparison: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(comparison.summary, 500)}`,
23100:             ...(rows.length ? ['', 'Catalogue requirement summary:', ...rows] : []),
23101:             ''
23102:         ];
23103:     }
23104: 
23105: 
23106:     function missionRequirementsExclusiveUnitBuckets(selectedUnits, respondingUnits, onSiteUnits) {
23107:         const claimed = new Set();
23108:         const keysFor = unit => {
23109:             const keys = [];
23110:             if (unit?.vehicleId >= 0) keys.push(`vehicle:${unit.vehicleId}`);
23111:             if (unit?.contributionKey && !String(unit.contributionKey).startsWith('element:')) keys.push(String(unit.contributionKey));
23112:             return keys;
23113:         };
23114:         const claim = units => Array.from(units || []).filter(unit => {
23115:             const keys = keysFor(unit);
23116:             if (keys.some(key => claimed.has(key))) return false;
23117:             keys.forEach(key => claimed.add(key));
23118:             return true;
23119:         });
23120:         const onSite = claim(onSiteUnits);
23121:         const responding = claim(respondingUnits);
23122:         const selected = claim(selectedUnits);
23123:         return { selected, responding, onSite };
23124:     }
23125: 
23126:     function missionRequirementsResolve(candidate, parsed, catalogue = null) {
23127:         const rawSelectedUnits = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'selected');
23128:         const rawRespondingUnits = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'responding');
23129:         const rawOnSiteUnits = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'onsite');
23130:         const buckets = missionRequirementsExclusiveUnitBuckets(rawSelectedUnits, rawRespondingUnits, rawOnSiteUnits);
23131:         const catalogueByKey = new Map(Array.from(catalogue?.requirements || []).map(item => [item.key, item]));
23132:         return parsed.requirements.map(requirement => {
23133:             if (requirement.definition?.countable === false) return missionRequirementsUnknownCoverageRow(requirement);
23134:             const condition = missionRequirementsDefinitionCondition(requirement.definition, candidate);
23135:             if (condition !== true) {
23136:                 const unknown = missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false);
23137:                 const unresolvedRow = missionRequirementsCoverageRow(requirement, unknown, unknown, unknown, unknown);
23138:                 return { ...unresolvedRow, conditionKnown: condition !== null, conditionMatched: false, uncertain: true, definitelyOpen: false, coverageKnown: false };
23139:             }
23140:             let selected;
23141:             let responding;
23142:             let onSite;
23143:             if (requirement.definition?.bar) {
23144:                 const selectedValue = missionRequirementsProgressValue(candidate, requirement.definition.bar, 'selected');
23145:                 const respondingValue = missionRequirementsProgressValue(candidate, requirement.definition.bar, 'driving');
23146:                 const onSiteMetrics = ['at_mission', 'on_site', 'onsite', 'arrived', 'actual'];
23147:                 const onSiteValue = onSiteMetrics.map(metric => missionRequirementsProgressValue(candidate, requirement.definition.bar, metric)).find(value => value !== null);
23148:                 selected = selectedValue === null ? missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false) : missionRequirementsCapacity(selectedValue, selectedValue, true);
23149:                 responding = respondingValue === null ? missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false) : missionRequirementsCapacity(respondingValue, respondingValue, true);
23150:                 onSite = onSiteValue === undefined ? missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false) : missionRequirementsCapacity(onSiteValue, onSiteValue, true);
===== lines 23151-23950 =====
23151:             } else {
23152:                 selected = missionRequirementsAggregate(requirement, buckets.selected);
23153:                 responding = missionRequirementsAggregate(requirement, buckets.responding);
23154:                 onSite = missionRequirementsAggregate(requirement, buckets.onSite);
23155:             }
23156: 
23157:             const catalogueRequirement = catalogueByKey.get(requirement.key);
23158:             const baseline = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(catalogueRequirement?.baseline ?? catalogueRequirement?.missing);
23159:             if (baseline !== null) {
23160:                 const inferredOnSite = Math.max(0, baseline - Math.max(0, Number(requirement.missing) || 0));
23161:                 if (inferredOnSite > onSite.min) {
23162:                     const inferredMax = onSite.max === null ? null : Math.max(onSite.max, inferredOnSite);
23163:                     onSite = missionRequirementsCapacity(inferredOnSite, inferredMax, onSite.known && inferredMax === inferredOnSite);
23164:                 }
23165:             }
23166:             const liveRequiredMin = Math.max(0, Number(requirement.missing) || 0) + onSite.min;
23167:             const liveRequiredMax = onSite.max === null ? null : Math.max(0, Number(requirement.missing) || 0) + onSite.max;
23168:             const required = baseline !== null
23169:                 ? missionRequirementsCapacity(Math.max(baseline, liveRequiredMin), Math.max(baseline, liveRequiredMin), true)
23170:                 : missionRequirementsCapacity(liveRequiredMin, liveRequiredMax, onSite.known && liveRequiredMax !== null && liveRequiredMin === liveRequiredMax);
23171:             return {
23172:                 ...missionRequirementsCoverageRow(requirement, selected, responding, onSite, required),
23173:                 conditionKnown: true,
23174:                 conditionMatched: true,
23175:                 requirementAuthority: baseline !== null ? 'catalogue+live' : 'live-reconstructed'
23176:             };
23177:         });
23178:     }
23179: 
23180:     function missionRequirementsOverallState(rows, unresolved) {
23181:         if (rows.some(row => row.definitelyOpen)) return 'danger';
23182:         if (rows.some(row => row.uncertain) || unresolved.length) return 'warning';
23183:         return rows.length ? 'success' : 'warning';
23184:     }
23185: 
23186:     function missionRequirementsLssmActive(candidate, source) {
23187:         // MissionChief and LSSM both use the generic alert-missing-vehicles class.
23188:         // Only explicit LSSM ownership metadata may suppress the Toolkit panel.
23189:         const ownedSelector = [
23190:         '.alert-missing-vehicles[data-raw-html]',
23191:         '[data-lssm-enhanced-missing-vehicles]',
23192:             '[data-lssm-module="extendedCallWindow.enhancedMissingVehicles"]'
23193:         ].join(', ');
23194:         const isLssmOwned = element => {
23195:         if (!element) return false;
23196:         const sharedAlert = Boolean(
23197:             element.matches?.('.alert-missing-vehicles')
23198:             || element.classList?.contains?.('alert-missing-vehicles')
23199:         );
23200:             const rawHtml = element.getAttribute?.('data-raw-html');
23201:             if (sharedAlert && rawHtml !== null && rawHtml !== undefined) return true;
23202:             return Boolean(
23203:                 element.matches?.('[data-lssm-enhanced-missing-vehicles]')
23204:                 || element.matches?.('[data-lssm-module="extendedCallWindow.enhancedMissingVehicles"]')
23205:             );
23206:         };
23207: 
23208:         if (isLssmOwned(source)) return true;
23209:         const closestOwned = source?.closest?.(ownedSelector);
23210:         if (isLssmOwned(closestOwned)) return true;
23211:         return isLssmOwned(candidate?.root?.querySelector?.(ownedSelector));
23212:     }
23213: 
23214:     function missionRequirementsExplicitSource(source) {
23215:         if (!source || source.isConnected === false) return false;
23216:         if (source.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' || source.id === 'missing_text') return true;
23217:         if (source.matches?.('[data-requirement-type], .alert-missing-vehicles, [data-lssm-enhanced-missing-vehicles], [data-lssm-module="extendedCallWindow.enhancedMissingVehicles"]')) return true;
23218:         return Boolean(source.querySelector?.('[data-requirement-type], .alert-missing-vehicles[data-raw-html], [data-lssm-enhanced-missing-vehicles]'));
23219:     }
23220: 
23221:     function missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, node) {
23222:         let current = node;
23223:         while (current?.parentNode && current.parentNode !== root) current = current.parentNode;
23224:         return current?.parentNode === root ? current : node;
23225:     }
23226: 
23227:     function missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(node, boundary = null) {
23228:         const unsafeTags = new Set(['TABLE', 'THEAD', 'TBODY', 'TFOOT', 'TR', 'TD', 'TH', 'COLGROUP']);
23229:         let current = node;
23230:         while (current && current !== boundary) {
23231:             if (unsafeTags.has(String(current.tagName || '').toUpperCase())) return true;
23232:             current = current.parentNode;
23233:         }
23234:         return false;
23235:     }
23236: 
23237:     function missionRequirementsPlacementBlock(root, node) {
23238:         if (!root || !node) return null;
23239:         let target = node;
23240:         let current = node;
23241:         while (current && current !== root) {
23242:             if (String(current.tagName || '').toUpperCase() === 'TABLE') target = current;
23243:             current = current.parentNode;
23244:         }
23245:         const block = missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, target);
23246:         const parent = block?.parentNode || root;
23247:         if (!parent || missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(parent, root?.parentNode || null)) {
23248:             return { root, parent: root, before: root.firstChild || null };
23249:         }
23250:         return { root, parent, before: block };
23251:     }
23252: 
23253:     function missionRequirementsPlacement(candidate, source = null) {
23254:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) || candidate?.root || candidate?.mount;
23255:         if (!root) return null;
23256:         const native = root.matches?.('#missing_text') ? root : root.querySelector?.('#missing_text');
23257:         const explicit = native || (missionRequirementsExplicitSource(source) && source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') !== '1' ? source : null);
23258:         if (explicit?.parentNode) return missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(explicit.parentNode, root?.parentNode || null)
23259:             ? missionRequirementsPlacementBlock(root, explicit)
23260:             : { root, parent: explicit.parentNode, before: explicit };
23261:         const address = root.querySelector?.('#mission_address, [data-mission-address], .mission-address, .mission_address');
23262:         const title = root.querySelector?.('#mission_caption, #mission_name, [data-mission-title], .mission-title, .mission_caption, h1');
23263:         const header = address || title;
23264:         if (header) {
23265:             const block = missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, header);
23266:             const parent = block?.parentNode || root;
23267:             const siblings = Array.from(parent.children || []);
23268:             const index = siblings.indexOf(block);
23269:             return { root, parent, before: index >= 0 ? (siblings[index + 1] || null) : (block?.nextSibling || null) };
23270:         }
23271:         // Operational regions may load before the mission header during AJAX dispatch.
23272:         // They remain data sources only and are never valid panel hosts.
23273:         return null;
23274:     }
23275: 
23276:     function missionRequirementsPlacePanel(candidate, source, panel) {
23277:         const placement = missionRequirementsPlacement(candidate, source);
23278:         if (!placement?.parent || !panel) return false;
23279:         const siblings = Array.from(placement.parent.children || []);
23280:         const panelIndex = siblings.indexOf(panel);
23281:         const beforeIndex = placement.before ? siblings.indexOf(placement.before) : siblings.length;
23282:         if (panel.parentNode !== placement.parent || panelIndex < 0 || panelIndex !== beforeIndex - 1) {
23283:             placement.parent.insertBefore?.(panel, placement.before || null);
23284:         }
23285:         return true;
23286:     }
23287: 
23288:     function missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate(candidate) {
23289:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) || candidate?.root;
23290:         const supplied = candidate?.source;
23291:         const native = root?.matches?.('#missing_text') ? root : root?.querySelector?.('#missing_text');
23292:         if (native && native.isConnected !== false) return native;
23293:         if (supplied?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' && supplied.isConnected !== false) {
23294:             const placement = missionRequirementsPlacement({ ...candidate, root, mount: root }, supplied);
23295:             if (placement?.parent) return supplied;
23296:             supplied.remove?.();
23297:         }
23298:         return missionRequirementsExplicitSource(supplied) ? supplied : null;
23299:     }
23300: 
23301:     function missionRequirementsCandidateFromSource(source) {
23302:         if (!source?.ownerDocument || source.isConnected === false) return null;
23303:         const rootSelector = [
23304:             '#mission_form',
23305:             'form[action*="/missions/"]',
23306:             '#mission_content',
23307:             '#lightbox_box',
23308:             '#lightbox',
23309:             '.lightbox_content',
23310:             '.modal',
23311:             '[role="dialog"]',
23312:             '.ui-dialog'
23313:         ].join(', ');
23314:         const root = source.closest?.(rootSelector) || source.parentNode || source.ownerDocument.body;
23315:         if (!root) return null;
23316:         return { root, mount: root, source, directMissionRequirements: true };
23317:     }
23318: 
23319:     function missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate(candidate) {
23320:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) || candidate?.root || candidate?.mount;
23321:         if (!root?.ownerDocument?.createElement) return null;
23322:         let anchor = Array.from(root.children || []).find(node => node?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1')
23323:             || root.querySelector?.('[data-mcms-requirements-anchor="1"]');
23324:         const placement = missionRequirementsPlacement({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23325:         if (!placement?.parent) {
23326:             anchor?.remove?.();
23327:             return null;
23328:         }
23329:         if (!anchor || anchor.isConnected === false) {
23330:             anchor = root.ownerDocument.createElement('span');
23331:             anchor.hidden = true;
23332:             anchor.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
23333:             anchor.setAttribute('data-mcms-requirements-anchor', '1');
23334:         }
23335:         placement.parent.insertBefore?.(anchor, placement.before || null);
23336:         return anchor;
23337:     }
23338: 
23339:     function missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) {
23340:         const missionSelector = '#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content, .mission_content, [data-mission-content]';
23341:         const windowSelector = '#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal-body, .modal, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog-content, .ui-dialog';
23342:         const nodes = [candidate?.source, candidate?.root, candidate?.mount].filter(Boolean);
23343:         const missionWithin = node => {
23344:             if (!node) return null;
23345:             if (node.matches?.(missionSelector)) return node;
23346:             const closest = node.closest?.(missionSelector);
23347:             if (closest) return closest;
23348:             return node.querySelector?.(missionSelector) || null;
23349:         };
23350:         for (const node of nodes) {
23351:             const mission = missionWithin(node);
23352:             if (mission) return mission;
23353:         }
23354:         for (const node of nodes) {
23355:             const windowRoot = node.matches?.(windowSelector) ? node : node.closest?.(windowSelector);
23356:             if (windowRoot) return missionWithin(windowRoot) || windowRoot;
23357:         }
23358:         for (const node of nodes) {
23359:             try {
23360:                 const frame = node.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.frameElement || null;
23361:                 if (!frame) continue;
23362:                 const frameMission = missionWithin(frame);
23363:                 if (frameMission) return frameMission;
23364:                 const frameWindow = frame.matches?.(windowSelector) ? frame : frame.closest?.(windowSelector);
23365:                 if (frameWindow) return missionWithin(frameWindow) || frameWindow;
23366:             } catch (err) {}
23367:         }
23368:         return candidate?.root || candidate?.mount || candidate?.source || null;
23369:     }
23370: 
23371:     function missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow(candidate) {
23372:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23373:         if (!root?.querySelector) return false;
23374:         if (missionRequirementsMissionIdentity({ ...candidate, root }, missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root })) > 0) return true;
23375:         if (root.matches?.('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) return true;
23376:         return Boolean(root.querySelector('#vehicle_show_table_body_all, #mission_vehicle_driving, .vehicle_checkbox, [mission_type_id], [data-mission-type-id]'));
23377:     }
23378: 
23379:     function missionRequirementsPrimaryRuntime(){try{return!pageWindow.top||pageWindow.top===pageWindow}catch{return true}}
23380:     function missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate,source){const r=candidate?.root,l=r?.querySelector?.('a[href*="/missions/"],form[action*="/missions/"]');for(const v of[candidate?.missionId,candidate?.mission_id,r?.dataset?.missionId,r?.getAttribute?.('mission_id'),r?.getAttribute?.('action'),l?.getAttribute?.('href'),l?.getAttribute?.('action'),source?.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.location?.pathname]){const m=String(v??'').match(/(?:\/missions\/|mission[_-]?)(\d+)|^(\d+)$/i),id=+(m?.[1]||m?.[2]);if(id>0)return id}return 0}
23381:     function missionRequirementsWindowCandidates() {
23382:         const candidates = [];
23383:         const seenSources = new Set();
23384:         const seenRoots = new Set();
23385:         const add = (candidate, trusted = false) => {
23386:             const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23387:             if (!root || seenRoots.has(root)) return;
23388:             let source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23389:             if (!source) {
23390:                 if (!trusted && !missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow({ ...candidate, root, mount: root })) return;
23391:                 source = missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23392:             }
23393:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false || seenSources.has(source)) return;
23394:             seenRoots.add(root);
23395:             seenSources.add(source);
23396:             candidates.push({ ...candidate, root, mount: root, source });
23397:         };
23398:         missionValueWindowCandidates().forEach(candidate => add(candidate, true));
23399:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
23400:             const doc = context?.doc;
23401:             if (!doc?.querySelectorAll) continue;
23402:             for (const source of doc.querySelectorAll('#missing_text')) add(missionRequirementsCandidateFromSource(source), true);
23403:             for (const root of doc.querySelectorAll('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) add({ root, mount: root }, false);
23404:         }
23405:         const priority = candidate => {
23406:             const source = candidate?.source;
23407:             return (isVisible(candidate?.root) ? 100 : 0)
23408:                 + (source?.id === 'missing_text' || source?.matches?.('#missing_text') ? 20 : 0)
23409:                 + (source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' ? 0 : 5)
23410:                 + (missionRequirementsRecords.has(source) ? 1 : 0);
23411:         };
23412:         const missionIds = new Set();
23413:         return candidates.sort((left, right) => priority(right) - priority(left)).filter(candidate => {
23414:             const missionId = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, candidate.source);
23415:             if (!missionId) return true;
23416:             if (missionIds.has(missionId)) return false;
23417:             missionIds.add(missionId);
23418:             return true;
23419:         });
23420:     }
23421: 
23422:     function missionRequirementsDocumentCss() {
23423:         return `
23424: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}{--mcms-req-accent:#6fd7ff;--mcms-req-surface:#101820;--mcms-req-surface-2:#17242f;--mcms-req-border:rgba(111,215,255,.38);--mcms-req-text:#eef9ff;--mcms-req-muted:#a9bdc8;display:block!important;position:relative!important;clear:both!important;width:min(100%,940px)!important;max-width:100%!important;box-sizing:border-box!important;margin:0 0 7px!important;border:1px solid var(--mcms-req-border)!important;border-left:4px solid var(--mcms-req-state,#ef5350)!important;border-radius:9px!important;background:linear-gradient(145deg,var(--mcms-req-surface),var(--mcms-req-surface-2))!important;color:var(--mcms-req-text)!important;box-shadow:0 5px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.19)!important;overflow:hidden!important;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif!important;z-index:auto!important}
23425: [data-mcms-requirements-source-hidden="1"]{display:none!important}
23426: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}[data-width-mode="wide"]{width:min(100%,1140px)!important}
23427: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}[data-width-mode="fluid"]{width:100%!important}
23428: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}[data-state="danger"]{--mcms-req-state:#ef5350}
23429: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}[data-state="warning"]{--mcms-req-state:#ffb74d}
23430: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}[data-state="success"]{--mcms-req-state:#4dd68a}
23431: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}[data-mcms-theme="cyberpunk"]{--mcms-req-accent:#00f0ff;--mcms-req-surface:#080b12;--mcms-req-surface-2:#111725;--mcms-req-border:rgba(0,240,255,.50);border-radius:2px!important}
23432: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}[data-mcms-theme="fallout4"]{--mcms-req-accent:#c8ff8b;--mcms-req-surface:#071008;--mcms-req-surface-2:#172817;--mcms-req-border:rgba(164,234,101,.48);--mcms-req-text:#d8ffad;--mcms-req-muted:#91b978}
23433: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}[data-mcms-theme="umbrella"]{--mcms-req-accent:#f4f6f8;--mcms-req-surface:#101114;--mcms-req-surface-2:#1c1d21;--mcms-req-border:rgba(214,39,50,.55)}
23434: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}[data-mcms-theme="factorio"]{--mcms-req-accent:#f0a44a;--mcms-req-surface:#171717;--mcms-req-surface-2:#2a2824;--mcms-req-border:rgba(240,164,74,.48);border-radius:4px!important}
23435: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}[data-mcms-theme="bond007"]{--mcms-req-accent:#d9bd77;--mcms-req-surface:#090a0c;--mcms-req-surface-2:#17191e;--mcms-req-border:rgba(217,189,119,.45)}
23436: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}[data-mcms-theme="hyrule"]{--mcms-req-accent:#6ee6d6;--mcms-req-surface:#10231d;--mcms-req-surface-2:#17352b;--mcms-req-border:rgba(217,183,90,.48)}
23437: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-head{display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:7px!important;min-width:0!important;padding:6px 9px!important;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10)!important;background:rgba(0,0,0,.16)!important}
23438: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-title{display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:7px!important;min-width:0!important;flex:1 1 auto!important;font-size:13px!important;line-height:1.15!important;font-weight:900!important;letter-spacing:.12px!important;color:var(--mcms-req-text)!important}
23439: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-title i{display:block!important;width:8px!important;height:8px!important;flex:0 0 8px!important;border-radius:50%!important;background:var(--mcms-req-state)!important;box-shadow:0 0 9px color-mix(in srgb,var(--mcms-req-state) 65%,transparent)!important}
23440: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-summary{flex:0 1 auto!important;min-width:0!important;max-width:50%!important;padding:3px 7px!important;border:1px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--mcms-req-state) 52%,transparent)!important;border-radius:999px!important;color:var(--mcms-req-text)!important;background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--mcms-req-state) 15%,transparent)!important;font-size:10px!important;line-height:1.15!important;font-weight:850!important;white-space:normal!important;text-align:center!important;overflow-wrap:anywhere!important}
23441: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-collapse{display:inline-flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;flex:0 0 26px!important;width:26px!important;height:24px!important;padding:0!important;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18)!important;border-radius:6px!important;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07)!important;color:var(--mcms-req-text)!important;font:900 13px/1 Arial,sans-serif!important;cursor:pointer!important}
23442: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}.mcms-collapsed .mcms-req-body{display:none!important}
23443: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-body{max-height:min(36vh,360px)!important;overflow:auto!important;overscroll-behavior:contain!important}
23444: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} table{width:100%!important;max-width:100%!important;border-collapse:separate!important;border-spacing:0!important;table-layout:fixed!important;margin:0!important;background:transparent!important;color:inherit!important}
23445: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} col.mcms-req-name-col{width:40%!important}
23446: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} col.mcms-req-number-col{width:12%!important}
23447: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} thead th{position:sticky!important;top:0!important;z-index:2!important;padding:5px 4px!important;border:0!important;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12)!important;background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--mcms-req-surface-2) 94%,black)!important;color:var(--mcms-req-muted)!important;font-size:9.5px!important;line-height:1.1!important;font-weight:900!important;letter-spacing:.12px!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;white-space:normal!important;text-align:center!important;overflow-wrap:anywhere!important}
23448: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} thead th:first-child{text-align:left!important;padding-left:7px!important}
23449: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr{--mcms-row-state:#ef5350}
23450: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr[data-row-state="covered"]{--mcms-row-state:#4dd68a}
23451: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr[data-row-state="partial"]{--mcms-row-state:#ffb74d}
23452: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr[data-row-state="unresolved"]{--mcms-row-state:#aab2bd}
23453: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody td{box-sizing:border-box!important;padding:5px 4px!important;border:0!important;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07)!important;background:transparent!important;color:var(--mcms-req-text)!important;font-size:12px!important;line-height:1.15!important;vertical-align:middle!important}
23454: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr:last-child td{border-bottom:0!important}
23455: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody td:first-child{padding-left:7px!important;border-left:3px solid var(--mcms-row-state)!important;font-weight:850!important;text-align:left!important;white-space:normal!important;overflow-wrap:anywhere!important;word-break:normal!important}
23456: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody td:not(:first-child){font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums!important;text-align:center!important;white-space:nowrap!important;font-weight:800!important}
23457: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr[data-row-state="covered"] td{background:rgba(77,214,138,.075)!important}
23458: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr[data-row-state="covered"] td:first-child{color:#9bf2bf!important}
23459: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr[data-row-state="partial"] td{background:rgba(255,183,77,.055)!important}
23460: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr[data-row-state="partial"] td:first-child{color:#ffd18a!important}
23461: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr[data-row-state="open"] td{background:rgba(239,83,80,.045)!important}
23462: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr[data-row-state="unresolved"] td{background:rgba(170,178,189,.055)!important}
23463: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-still{font-size:13px!important;font-weight:950!important;color:var(--mcms-row-state)!important}
23464: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-unknown{display:grid!important;gap:4px!important;padding:7px 9px 8px!important;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,183,77,.22)!important;background:rgba(255,183,77,.06)!important}
23465: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-unknown b{color:#ffd18a!important;font-size:10px!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;letter-spacing:.2px!important}
23466: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-unknown span{color:var(--mcms-req-text)!important;font-size:11px!important;line-height:1.3!important;overflow-wrap:anywhere!important}
23467: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-fallback{display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:space-between!important;gap:10px!important;padding:9px!important;color:var(--mcms-req-text)!important;font-size:11px!important;line-height:1.35!important}
23468: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-fallback-message{min-width:0!important;overflow-wrap:anywhere!important}
23469: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-report{display:inline-flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;flex:0 0 auto!important;padding:5px 8px!important;border:1px solid rgba(255,183,77,.58)!important;border-radius:6px!important;background:rgba(255,183,77,.14)!important;color:#ffe0aa!important;font:800 10px/1.2 Arial,sans-serif!important;cursor:pointer!important}
23470: #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-unknown .mcms-req-report{justify-self:start!important;margin-top:2px!important}
23471: @media(min-width:768px) and (max-width:1180px){#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}{width:100%!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-head{padding:6px 8px!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} thead th{font-size:9px!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody td{font-size:11.5px!important;padding:5px 3px!important}}
23472: @media(max-width:767px){#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}{margin-bottom:6px!important;border-radius:7px!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-head{padding:6px 7px!important;gap:6px!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-title{font-size:12px!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-summary{max-width:47%!important;font-size:9px!important;padding:3px 5px!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-body{max-height:min(42vh,390px)!important;padding:5px!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} table,#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody{display:block!important;width:100%!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} colgroup,#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} thead{display:none!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr))!important;gap:0!important;margin:0 0 5px!important;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.11)!important;border-left:3px solid var(--mcms-row-state)!important;border-radius:6px!important;background:rgba(255,255,255,.035)!important;overflow:hidden!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody tr:last-child{margin-bottom:0!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody td{display:flex!important;flex-direction:column!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;min-width:0!important;min-height:38px!important;padding:4px 2px!important;border:0!important;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07)!important;font-size:11.5px!important;white-space:normal!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody td:last-child{border-right:0!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody td:first-child{grid-column:1/-1!important;display:block!important;min-height:0!important;padding:6px!important;border-left:0!important;border-right:0!important;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09)!important;font-size:12px!important;text-align:left!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} tbody td:not(:first-child)::before{content:attr(data-label)!important;display:block!important;margin-bottom:2px!important;color:var(--mcms-req-muted)!important;font-size:7.5px!important;line-height:1!important;font-weight:900!important;letter-spacing:.08px!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;text-align:center!important;white-space:normal!important;overflow-wrap:anywhere!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-fallback{align-items:stretch!important;flex-direction:column!important}#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId} .mcms-req-report{align-self:flex-start!important}}
23473:         `;
23474:     }
23475: 
23476:     function ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc) {
23477:         if (!doc?.createElement) return;
23478:         const requirementsDocumentStyleId = SCRIPT.missionRequirementsDocumentStyleId;
23479:         let style = doc.getElementById?.(requirementsDocumentStyleId);
23480:         if (!style) {
23481:             style = doc.createElement('style');
23482:             style.id = requirementsDocumentStyleId;
23483:             (doc.head || doc.documentElement)?.appendChild(style);
23484:         }
23485:         const css = missionRequirementsDocumentCss();
23486:         if (style.textContent !== css) style.textContent = css;
23487:     }
23488: 
23489:     function missionRequirementsHideSource(source) {
23490:         if (!source || source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden === '1') return;
23491:         source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden = '1';
23492:     }
23493: 
23494:     function missionRequirementsRestoreSource(source) {
23495:         if (!source || source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden !== '1') return;
23496:         delete source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden;
23497:     }
23498: 
23499:     function missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows = [], unresolved = []) {
23500:         const labels = Array.from(rows || []).map(row => String(row?.requirement || row?.catalogueLabel || row?.label || ''));
23501:         const fragments = Array.from(unresolved || []).map(item => String(item?.text || [item?.label, item?.value].filter(Boolean).join(': ') || item || ''));
23502:         const longestLabel = labels.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23503:         const longestFragment = fragments.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23504:         if (longestLabel > 62 || longestFragment > 150) return 'fluid';
23505:         if (longestLabel > 32 || longestFragment > 72) return 'wide';
23506:         return 'standard';
23507:     }
23508: 
23509:     function missionRequirementsPanelHtml(rows, unresolved) {
23510:         const definiteOutstanding = rows.filter(row => row.definitelyOpen).length;
23511:         const uncertain = rows.filter(row => row.uncertain).length + unresolved.length;
23512:         const fulfilled = rows.filter(row => row.covered).length;
23513:         const stateName = missionRequirementsOverallState(rows, unresolved);
23514:         const summary = stateName === 'success'
23515:             ? `All ${rows.length} covered`
23516:             : stateName === 'warning'
23517:                 ? `${uncertain} need confirmation · ${fulfilled}/${rows.length} covered`
23518:                 : `${definiteOutstanding} outstanding · ${fulfilled}/${rows.length} covered`;
23519:         const rowHtml = rows.map(row => {
23520:             const rowState = row.covered ? 'covered' : row.uncertain ? 'unresolved' : row.partial ? 'partial' : 'open';
23521:             const prefix = row.covered ? '✓ ' : '';
23522:             const requiredText = row.requiredText || (Number.isFinite(Number(row.missing)) ? Number(row.missing).toLocaleString('en-GB') : '?');
23523:             const onSiteText = row.onSiteText || '?';
23524:             const respondingText = row.respondingText || row.enRouteText || '?';
23525:             const selectedText = row.selectedText || '?';
23526:             const stillText = row.stillNeededText || '?';
23527:             const status = row.covered ? 'fulfilled' : row.uncertain ? 'requires confirmation' : row.partial ? 'partially fulfilled' : 'outstanding';
23528:             return `<tr data-row-state="${rowState}" title="${escapeHtml(`${row.requirement}: ${status}`)}"><td>${escapeHtml(prefix + row.requirement)}</td><td data-label="Required">${escapeHtml(requiredText)}</td><td data-label="On site">${escapeHtml(onSiteText)}</td><td data-label="Respond.">${escapeHtml(respondingText)}</td><td data-label="Selected">${escapeHtml(selectedText)}</td><td class="mcms-req-still" data-label="Need">${escapeHtml(stillText)}</td></tr>`;
23529:         }).join('');
23530:         const unknownHtml = unresolved.length
23531:             ? `<div class="mcms-req-unknown"><b>Unresolved MissionChief requirement</b>${unresolved.map(item => `<span>${escapeHtml(item.text)}</span>`).join('')}<button type="button" class="mcms-req-report" data-mcms-report-mission>Report Mission</button></div>`
23532:             : '';
23533:         return {
23534:             stateName,
23535:             widthMode: missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows, unresolved),
23536:             html: `<div class="mcms-req-head"><div class="mcms-req-title"><i aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Mission Requirements</span></div><span class="mcms-req-summary">${escapeHtml(summary)}</span><button type="button" class="mcms-req-collapse" data-mcms-requirements-collapse aria-label="Collapse mission requirements" aria-expanded="true">⌃</button></div><div class="mcms-req-body"><table aria-label="Live mission requirements"><colgroup><col class="mcms-req-name-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"></colgroup><thead><tr><th scope="col">Requirement</th><th scope="col">Required</th><th scope="col">On site</th><th scope="col">Responding</th><th scope="col">Selected</th><th scope="col">Still needed</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rowHtml}</tbody></table>${unknownHtml}</div>`
23537:         };
23538:     }
23539: 
23540:     function missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(value, limit = 600) {
23541:         let text = Array.from(String(value ?? ''), ch => { const code = ch.charCodeAt(0); return code < 32 || code === 127 ? ' ' : ch; }).join('').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
23542:         text = text
23543:             .replace(/https?:\/\/(?:discord(?:app)?\.com\/api\/webhooks|[^\s/]+\/webhooks)\/\S+/gi, '[redacted webhook]')
23544:             .replace(/\b(?:csrf|authenticity|authorization|session|cookie|token|password|secret|api[_-]?key)\b\s*[:=]\s*[^\s,;]+/gi, match => `${match.split(/[:=]/)[0]}: [redacted]`)
23545:             .replace(/\b[A-Z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z]{2,}\b/gi, '[redacted email]')
23546:             .replace(/-?\d{1,3}\.\d{4,}\s*[,/]\s*-?\d{1,3}\.\d{4,}/g, '[redacted coordinates]');
23547:         return text.slice(0, Math.max(0, limit));
23548:     }
23549: 
23550:     function missionRequirementsTypeSummary(units) {
23551:         const counts = new Map();
23552:         for (const unit of units || []) if (Number.isFinite(unit?.typeId) && unit.typeId >= 0) counts.set(unit.typeId, (counts.get(unit.typeId) || 0) + 1);
23553:         return Array.from(counts.entries()).sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]).map(([type, count]) => `${type}×${count}`).join(', ') || 'None detected';
23554:     }
23555: 
23556:     function missionRequirementsMissionTitle(record) {
23557:         const root = record?.candidate?.root || record?.candidate?.mount;
23558:         const node = root?.querySelector?.('[data-mission-title], #mission_name, .mission-title, .mission_caption, h1');
23559:         return missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(node?.getAttribute?.('data-mission-title') || node?.textContent || node?.innerText || '', 100);
23560:     }
23561: 
23562:     function missionRequirementsReportUrl(record, reason = 'unknown') {
23563:         const candidate = record?.candidate || {};
23564:         const source = record?.source;
23565:         const root = candidate.root || candidate.mount;
23566:         const doc = source?.ownerDocument || root?.ownerDocument;
23567:         const view = doc?.defaultView || pageWindow;
23568:         const missionId = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, source) || 'Unknown';
23569:         const title = missionRequirementsMissionTitle(record);
23570:         const missionType = missionRequirementsMissionTypeId(candidate);
23571:         const raw = source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' ? '' : missionRequirementsElementText(source);
23572:         let parsed = { requirements: [], unresolved: [] };
23573:         try { if (raw) parsed = missionRequirementsParseSource(source); } catch (err) {}
23574:         missionRequirementsCatalogueEnsure(record);
23575:         const selected = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'selected');
23576:         const responding = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'responding');
23577:         const onSite = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'onsite');
23578:         const classes = Array.from(source?.classList || []).filter(value => /^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{1,40}$/.test(value)).slice(0, 8).join(' ');
23579:         const count = selector => { try { return root?.querySelectorAll?.(selector)?.length || 0; } catch (err) { return 0; } };
23580:         const platform = missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(view?.navigator?.userAgentData?.platform || view?.navigator?.platform || 'Unknown', 80);
23581:         const mobile = view?.navigator?.userAgentData?.mobile === true ? 'yes' : 'no/unknown';
23582:         const path = missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(view?.location?.pathname || '', 180);
23583:         const mode = state.uiMode || state.operatingMode || (Number(view?.innerWidth) <= 767 ? 'mobile' : Number(view?.innerWidth) <= 1180 ? 'tablet' : 'desktop');
23584:         const fields = [
23585:             '## Automatically harvested Mission Requirements diagnostic',
23586:             '',
23587:             '> Review this report before submitting. No GitHub token, cookies, chat, coordinates, addresses, vehicle IDs or authentication data are included.',
23588:             '',
23589:             `- **Failure reason:** ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(reason, 120) || 'Unknown'}`,
23590:             `- **Mission ID:** ${missionId}`,
23591:             `- **Mission title:** ${title || 'Unavailable'}`,
23592:             `- **Mission type ID:** ${missionType ?? 'Unavailable'}`,
23593:             `- **MissionChief path:** ${path || 'Unavailable'}`,
23594:             `- **Toolkit version:** ${SCRIPT.version}`,
23595:             `- **Layout:** ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(mode, 40)}`,
23596:             `- **Viewport:** ${Number(view?.innerWidth) || 0}×${Number(view?.innerHeight) || 0}`,
23597:             `- **Platform:** ${platform}; mobile=${mobile}`,
23598:             '',
23599:             '### Requirement source',
23600:             `- Present: ${source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' ? 'No' : 'Yes'}`,
23601:             `- Element: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(source?.tagName || 'Unavailable', 30)}#${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(source?.id || '', 60)}`,
23602:             `- Classes: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(classes, 180) || 'None'}`,
23603:             `- Typed groups: ${count('[data-requirement-type]')}`,
23604:             `- Parsed rows: ${parsed.requirements.length}`,
23605:             `- Unresolved fragments: ${parsed.unresolved.length}`,
23606:             '',
23607:             ...missionRequirementsCatalogueDiagnosticLines(record, parsed),
23608:             '### Native selector counts',
23609:             `- missing_text: ${count('#missing_text')}`,
23610:             `- selected checkboxes: ${count('.vehicle_checkbox:checked')}`,
23611:             `- responding rows: ${count('#mission_vehicle_driving tbody tr')}`,
23612:             `- on-site rows: ${count('#mission_vehicle_at_mission tbody tr')}`,
23613:             `- selected vehicle types: ${missionRequirementsTypeSummary(selected)}`,
23614:             `- responding vehicle types: ${missionRequirementsTypeSummary(responding)}`,
23615:             `- on-site vehicle types: ${missionRequirementsTypeSummary(onSite)}`,
23616:             '',
23617:             '### Visible requirement text',
23618:             '```text',
23619:             missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(raw, 1200) || 'Unavailable',
23620:             '```'
23621:         ];
23622:         const issueTitle = `Mission requirements missing: ${title || `Mission ${missionId}`}`.slice(0, 180);
23623:         let body = fields.join('\n');
23624:         const build = () => {
23625:             const params = new URLSearchParams({ template: 'mission-info-missing.yml', title: issueTitle, diagnostic: body });
23626:             return `https://github.com/Conroy1988/missionchief-toolkit-assets/issues/new?${params.toString()}`;
23627:         };
23628:         let url = build();
23629:         while (url.length > 7600 && body.length > 1800) {
23630:             body = `${body.slice(0, Math.max(1500, body.length - 500))}\n\n_Report shortened to fit GitHub's issue URL limit._`;
23631:             url = build();
23632:         }
23633:         return url;
23634:     }
23635:     function missionRequirementsFallbackHtml(kind) {
23636:         const loading = kind === 'loading';
23637:         const empty = kind === 'empty';
23638:         const message = loading ? 'Loading mission requirements…' : empty ? 'No outstanding requirements reported by MissionChief.' : 'Unable to pull mission requirements';
23639:         const summary = loading ? 'Loading' : empty ? 'No outstanding requirements' : 'Requirements unavailable';
23640:         const report = loading || empty ? '' : '<button type="button" class="mcms-req-report" data-mcms-report-mission>Report Mission</button>';
23641:         return { stateName: 'warning', html: `<div class="mcms-req-head"><div class="mcms-req-title"><i aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Mission Requirements</span></div><span class="mcms-req-summary">${summary}</span></div><div class="mcms-req-fallback"><span class="mcms-req-fallback-message">${message}</span>${report}</div>` };
23642:     }
23643: 
23644:     function missionRequirementsPresent(record, presentation, reason = '') {
23645:         record.panel.dataset.state = presentation.stateName;
23646:         record.panel.dataset.mcmsTheme = state.uiTheme;
23647:         record.panel.dataset.widthMode = presentation.widthMode || 'standard';
23648:         if (reason) record.panel.dataset.mcmsReportReason = reason;
23649:         else delete record.panel.dataset.mcmsReportReason;
23650:         setInnerHtmlIfChanged(record.panel, presentation.html);
23651:         const collapse = record.panel.querySelector('[data-mcms-requirements-collapse]');
23652:         if (collapse) {
23653:             const expanded = !record.panel.classList.contains('mcms-collapsed');
23654:             collapse.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(expanded));
23655:             collapse.setAttribute('aria-label', expanded ? 'Collapse mission requirements' : 'Expand mission requirements');
23656:             collapse.textContent = expanded ? '⌃' : '⌄';
23657:         }
23658:     }
23659: 
23660:     function missionRequirementsRenderRecord(record) {
23661:         if (!record?.source?.isConnected || !record?.candidate?.mount?.isConnected || !record?.panel?.isConnected) {
23662:             scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(0);
23663:             return;
23664:         }
23665:         if (missionRequirementsLssmActive(record.candidate, record.source)) {
23666:             missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(record.source);
23667:             return;
23668:         }
23669:         missionRequirementsCatalogueEnsure(record);
23670:         const presentCatalogue = reason => {
23671:             if (!record.catalogue) return false;
23672:             missionRequirementsRestoreSource(record.source);
23673:             missionRequirementsPresent(record, missionRequirementsCataloguePanelHtml({ ...record.catalogue, stale: record.catalogueState === 'stale' }), reason);
23674:             return true;
23675:         };
23676:         const age = Date.now() - (record.startedAt || Date.now());
23677:         const anchor = record.source.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1';
23678:         if (anchor) {
23679:             if (presentCatalogue('live requirement source absent; official catalogue baseline shown')) return;
23680:             missionRequirementsRestoreSource(record.source);
23681:             const loading = record.catalogueState === 'loading' || age < 1200;
23682:             missionRequirementsPresent(record, missionRequirementsFallbackHtml(loading ? 'loading' : 'error'), loading ? '' : 'requirement source and catalogue unavailable');
23683:             return;
23684:         }
23685:         const raw = missionRequirementsElementText(record.source);
23686:         if (!raw) {
23687:             missionRequirementsRestoreSource(record.source);
23688:             missionRequirementsPresent(record, missionRequirementsFallbackHtml(age < 1200 ? 'loading' : 'empty'));
23689:             return;
23690:         }
23691:         let parsed;
23692:         try { parsed = missionRequirementsParseSource(record.source); }
23693:         catch (err) {
23694:             if (presentCatalogue(`parser exception; official catalogue baseline shown: ${err?.message || 'unknown'}`)) return;
23695:             missionRequirementsRestoreSource(record.source);
23696:             missionRequirementsPresent(record, missionRequirementsFallbackHtml(record.catalogueState === 'loading' ? 'loading' : 'error'), `parser exception: ${err?.message || 'unknown'}`);
23697:             return;
23698:         }
23699:         if (!parsed.requirements.length) {
23700:             if (presentCatalogue(parsed.unresolved.length ? 'live requirement text unparseable; official catalogue baseline shown' : 'no quantified live requirements; official catalogue baseline shown')) return;
23701:             missionRequirementsRestoreSource(record.source);
23702:             missionRequirementsPresent(record, missionRequirementsFallbackHtml(record.catalogueState === 'loading' ? 'loading' : 'error'), parsed.unresolved.length ? 'requirement text unparseable' : 'no quantified requirements detected');
23703:             return;
23704:         }
23705:         missionRequirementsHideSource(record.source);
23706:         missionRequirementsPresent(record, missionRequirementsPanelHtml(missionRequirementsResolve(record.candidate, parsed, record.catalogue), parsed.unresolved), parsed.unresolved.length ? 'partially unresolved requirement text' : '');
23707:     }
23708:     function missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record) {
23709:         if (!record || record.frame || runtime.destroyed) return;
23710:         record.frame = runtimeRequestAnimationFrame(() => {
23711:             record.frame = null;
23712:             missionRequirementsRenderRecord(record);
23713:         });
23714:     }
23715: 
23716:     function missionRequirementsMutationRelevant(record, mutation) {
23717:         const panel = record?.panel;
23718:         const target = mutation?.target;
23719:         if (panel && (target === panel || target?.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}`))) return false;
23720:         const selector = '#missing_text, [data-mcms-requirements-anchor], #mission_vehicle_driving, #mission_vehicle_at_mission, #vehicle_show_table_body_all, #occupied, .vehicle_checkbox, [vehicle_type_id], [data-vehicle-type-id], [data-vehicle_type_id], [data-equipment-types], [data-equipment-type], [data-current-personnel], [data-min-personnel], [data-max-personnel], [id^="mission_water_holder"], [id^="mission_foam_holder"], [id^="mission_pump_holder"]';
23721:         return mutationTouchesSelector(mutation, selector);
23722:     }
23723: 
23724:     function missionRequirementsHostPanels(source){return[...(source?.parentNode?.children||[])].filter(p=>p?.id===SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId||p?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-panel')==='1')}
23725:     function missionRequirementsCanonicalPanel(source,p){const a=missionRequirementsHostPanels(source);if(!a.length)return null;p=p&&a.includes(p)?p:a[0];p.setAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-panel','1');for(const x of a)if(x!==p)x.remove();return p}
23726:     function missionRequirementsBindPanel(p){if(!p||p.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-collapse-bound'))return;p.setAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-collapse-bound','1');p.addEventListener('click',e=>{const report=e.target?.closest?.('[data-mcms-report-mission]');if(report){const r=Array.from(missionRequirementsRecords.values()).find(x=>x.panel===p);const url=missionRequirementsReportUrl(r,p.dataset.mcmsReportReason||'unresolved requirement text');const opened=pageWindow.open?.(url,'_blank','noopener,noreferrer');try{if(opened)opened.opener=null}catch(err){}return}const b=e.target?.closest?.('[data-mcms-requirements-collapse]');if(!b)return;const c=p.classList.toggle('mcms-collapsed');b.setAttribute('aria-expanded',String(!c));b.setAttribute('aria-label',c?'Expand mission requirements':'Collapse mission requirements');b.textContent=c?'⌄':'⌃'})}
23727:     function missionRequirementsEnsureRecord(candidate, source) {
23728:         let record = missionRequirementsRecords.get(source);
23729:         let panel = missionRequirementsCanonicalPanel(source, record?.panel?.isConnected ? record.panel : null);
23730:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23731:         const scopedCandidate = { ...candidate, root, mount: root };
23732:         const missionIdentity = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(scopedCandidate, source);
23733:         if (record && panel) {
23734:             if (record.missionIdentity && missionIdentity && record.missionIdentity !== missionIdentity) {
23735:                 record.catalogueRequestToken = (Number(record.catalogueRequestToken) || 0) + 1;
23736:                 record.catalogue = null;
23737:                 record.catalogueDescriptor = null;
23738:                 record.catalogueState = 'idle';
23739:                 record.startedAt = Date.now();
23740:             }
23741:             record.missionIdentity = missionIdentity;
23742:             record.panel = panel;
23743:             record.candidate = scopedCandidate;
23744:             missionRequirementsPlacePanel(scopedCandidate, source, panel);
23745:             missionRequirementsBindPanel(panel);
23746:             missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record);
23747:             return record;
23748:         }
23749:         if (record) missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
23750:         const doc = source.ownerDocument || document;
23751:         for (const [otherSource] of missionRequirementsRecords) {
23752:             if (otherSource !== source && otherSource.ownerDocument === doc) missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(otherSource);
23753:         }
23754:         ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc);
23755:         panel = missionRequirementsCanonicalPanel(source);
23756:         if (!panel) {
23757:             panel = doc.createElement('section');
23758:             panel.id = SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId;
23759:             panel.setAttribute('data-mcms-requirements-panel', '1');
23760:             panel.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Live mission requirements');
23761:         }
23762:         missionRequirementsPlacePanel(scopedCandidate, source, panel);
23763:         panel.dataset.mcmsTheme = state.uiTheme;
23764:         missionRequirementsBindPanel(panel);
23765:         record = { candidate: scopedCandidate, source, panel, startedAt: Date.now(), missionIdentity };
23766:         const Observer = doc.defaultView?.MutationObserver || pageWindow.MutationObserver || MutationObserver;
23767:         if (root && typeof Observer === 'function') {
23768:             record.observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new Observer(mutations => mutations.some(mutation => missionRequirementsMutationRelevant(record, mutation)) && missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record)));
23769:             record.observer.observe(root, { childList: true, subtree: true, characterData: true, attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['checked', 'class', 'style', 'vehicle_type_id', 'data-vehicle-type-id', 'data-vehicle_type_id', 'data-equipment-types', 'data-equipment-type', 'data-current-personnel', 'data-min-personnel', 'data-max-personnel', 'tractive_vehicle_id', 'data-tractive-vehicle-id', 'trailer_id', 'data-trailer-id', 'sortvalue'] });
23770:         }
23771:         missionRequirementsRecords.set(source, record);
23772:         missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record);
23773:         return record;
23774:     }
23775: 
23776:     function missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source) {
23777:         const record = missionRequirementsRecords.get(source);
23778:         if (!record) {
23779:             missionRequirementsRestoreSource(source);
23780:             if (source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1') source.remove?.();
23781:             return;
23782:         }
23783:         if (record.frame) runtimeCancelAnimationFrame(record.frame);
23784:         runtimeUntrackObserver(record.observer);
23785:         try { record.panel?.remove(); } catch (err) {}
23786:         missionRequirementsRestoreSource(record.source);
23787:         if (record.source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1') record.source.remove?.();
23788:         missionRequirementsRecords.delete(source);
23789:     }
23790: 
23791:     function clearMissionRequirementsPanels() {
23792:         for (const source of Array.from(missionRequirementsRecords.keys())) missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
23793:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
23794:             try {
23795:                 context.doc.querySelectorAll?.(`#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}`).forEach(panel => panel.remove());
23796:                 context.doc.querySelectorAll?.('[data-mcms-requirements-source-hidden="1"]').forEach(missionRequirementsRestoreSource);
23797:                 context.doc.querySelectorAll?.('[data-mcms-requirements-anchor="1"]').forEach(anchor => anchor.remove());
23798:             } catch (err) {}
23799:         }
23800:     }
23801: 
23802:     function scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(delay = 60) {
23803:         runtimeClearTimeout(missionRequirementsScanTimer);
23804:         missionRequirementsScanTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
23805:             missionRequirementsScanTimer = null;
23806:             scanMissionRequirementsWindows();
23807:         }, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
23808:     }
23809: 
23810:     function scanMissionRequirementsWindows() {
23811:         if (runtime.destroyed || !missionRequirementsPrimaryRuntime()) return;
23812:         if (!state.missionRequirements) {
23813:             clearMissionRequirementsPanels();
23814:             return;
23815:         }
23816:         const activeSources = new Set();
23817:         const activeDocuments = new WeakSet();
23818:         for (const candidate of missionRequirementsWindowCandidates()) {
23819:             const source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate(candidate) || missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate(candidate);
23820:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false) continue;
23821:             const doc = source.ownerDocument || candidate?.root?.ownerDocument || document;
23822:             if (!doc || activeDocuments.has(doc)) continue;
23823:             activeDocuments.add(doc);
23824:             ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc);
23825:             if (missionRequirementsLssmActive(candidate, source)) {
23826:                 missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
23827:                 continue;
23828:             }
23829:             activeSources.add(source);
23830:             missionRequirementsEnsureRecord({ ...candidate, source }, source);
23831:         }
23832:         for (const source of Array.from(missionRequirementsRecords.keys())) {
23833:             if (source.isConnected === false || !activeSources.has(source)) missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
23834:         }
23835:     }
23836: 
23837:     function missionRequirementsScheduleDocumentRecords(doc) {
23838:         for (const record of missionRequirementsRecords.values()) {
23839:             if (record.source?.ownerDocument === doc) missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record);
23840:         }
23841:     }
23842: 
23843:     function observeMissionRequirementsFrame(frame) {
23844:         if (!frame || missionRequirementsObservedFrames.has(frame)) return;
23845:         missionRequirementsObservedFrames.add(frame);
23846:         const onLoad = () => scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(20);
23847:         frame.addEventListener('load', onLoad);
23848:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => frame.removeEventListener('load', onLoad));
23849:     }
23850: 
23851:     function observeMissionRequirementsDocument(doc) {
23852:         if (!doc) return;
23853:         ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc);
23854:         if (missionRequirementsObservedDocuments.has(doc)) return;
23855:         missionRequirementsObservedDocuments.add(doc);
23856:         try { doc.querySelectorAll('iframe, frame').forEach(observeMissionRequirementsFrame); } catch (err) {}
23857:         runtimeListen(doc, 'change', event => {
23858:             if (!event.target?.matches?.('.vehicle_checkbox, input[type="checkbox"][vehicle_type_id]')) return;
23859:             missionRequirementsScheduleDocumentRecords(doc);
23860:         }, true);
23861:         const root = doc.documentElement || doc.body;
23862:         if (!root) return;
23863:         const activitySelector = '#missing_text, [data-mcms-requirements-anchor], #mission_vehicle_driving, #mission_vehicle_at_mission, #vehicle_show_table_body_all, #occupied, .vehicle_checkbox, [vehicle_type_id], [data-vehicle-type-id], [data-vehicle_type_id], [data-equipment-types], [data-equipment-type], [data-current-personnel], [data-min-personnel], [data-max-personnel], [id^="mission_water_holder"], [id^="mission_foam_holder"], [id^="mission_pump_holder"], #lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog, iframe, frame';
23864:         const view = doc.defaultView || pageWindow;
23865:         const MutationObserverCtor = view?.MutationObserver || pageWindow.MutationObserver || MutationObserver;
23866:         const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserverCtor(mutations => {
23867:             const relevant = mutations.some(mutation => {
23868:                 if (mutation.target?.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}`)) return false;
23869:                 if (mutationTouchesSelector(mutation, activitySelector)) return true;
23870:                 return false;
23871:             });
23872:             if (!relevant) return;
23873:             try { doc.querySelectorAll('iframe, frame').forEach(observeMissionRequirementsFrame); } catch (err) {}
23874:             scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(35);
23875:             missionRequirementsScheduleDocumentRecords(doc);
23876:         }));
23877:         observer.observe(root, { childList: true, subtree: true, characterData: true });
23878:     }
23879: 
23880:     function installMissionRequirementsWindows() {
23881:         if (!missionRequirementsPrimaryRuntime()) return;
23882:         if (!missionRequirementsFeatureInstalled) {
23883:             missionRequirementsFeatureInstalled = true;
23884:             runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
23885:                 runtimeClearTimeout(missionRequirementsScanTimer);
23886:                 missionRequirementsScanTimer = null;
23887:                 clearMissionRequirementsPanels();
23888:                 for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
23889:                     try { context.doc.getElementById?.(SCRIPT.missionRequirementsDocumentStyleId)?.remove(); } catch (err) {}
23890:                 }
23891:             });
23892:         }
23893:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) observeMissionRequirementsDocument(context.doc);
23894:         scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(0);
23895:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(0), 180);
23896:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(0), 800);
23897:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(0), 1600);
23898:     }
23899: 
23900:     function criticalMissionValueForEntry(entry) {
23901:         return criticalMissionValueDetails(entry).value;
23902:     }
23903: 
23904:     function criticalValueEligible(entry) {
23905:         return selectedCriticalValueMode() === 'total' || Boolean(entry?.eligibleForCredits);
23906:     }
23907: 
23908:     function criticalValueGroup(entries, predicate = () => true) {
23909:         let total = 0;
23910:         let known = 0;
23911:         let unknown = 0;
23912:         let eligible = 0;
23913:         const seenMissionIds = new Set();
23914:         const sources = new Map();
23915:         for (const entry of entries) {
23916:             if (!predicate(entry) || !criticalValueEligible(entry)) continue;
23917:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId);
23918:             if (missionId !== null && seenMissionIds.has(missionId)) continue;
23919:             if (missionId !== null) seenMissionIds.add(missionId);
23920:             if (entry?.eligibleForCredits) eligible += 1;
23921:             const details = criticalMissionValueDetails(entry);
23922:             const value = details.value;
23923:             if (value === null || !Number.isFinite(Number(value))) {
23924:                 unknown += 1;
23925:                 continue;
23926:             }
23927:             total += Math.max(0, Number(value) || 0);
23928:             known += 1;
23929:             sources.set(details.source, (sources.get(details.source) || 0) + 1);
23930:         }
23931:         return { total: Math.round(total), known, unknown, eligible, count: seenMissionIds.size, sources };
23932:     }
23933: 
23934:     function criticalValueDisplay(group) {
23935:         if (!group?.known) return 'UNKNOWN';
23936:         return `≈${formatOperationalCompactCredits(group.total)} CR`;
23937:     }
23938: 
23939:     function criticalValueCoverage(group) {
23940:         return `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} / ${(group.known + group.unknown).toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued`;
23941:     }
23942: 
23943:     function criticalValueTitle(label, group) {
23944:         const knownText = `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued mission${group.known === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
23945:         const unknownText = group.unknown ? ` · ${group.unknown.toLocaleString('en-GB')} value${group.unknown === 1 ? '' : 's'} unavailable` : '';
23946:         return `${label}: approximately ${group.total.toLocaleString('en-GB')} credits from MissionChief average-credit data · ${knownText}${unknownText}`;
23947:     }
23948: 
23949:     function criticalValuesHtml(allEntries, visibleEntries) {
23950:         const scopedEntries = visibleEntries;
